name: Raphael Warnock
subject: FWD: post offices in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Wanted to flag this for you, friend.
Friend, _The New York Times_ just published a shocking report: The Trump administration is intensifying its efforts to undermine the U.S. Postal Service - just weeks before mail-in voting begins in the most important election of our lifetimes.

We have to act immediately to save the USPS and protect vote-by-mail - that's why we've created an urgent petition to demand Congress provide emergency funding for the USPS, but **we still need 34 more people from Georgia to sign before midnight, and we don't see your name yet.**
---
Officials warn that the U.S. Postal Service - which millions of Americans depend on for food, prescriptions and mail-in ballots - could go _bankrupt_ as soon as next month if we don't take action immediately.
That's why I'm worried, friend. With just a few hours until our crucial midnight deadline - and the Trump administration attacking the Postal Service at every turn - I need to ask: **Will you add your name alongside mine ****to demand Congress save the U.S. Postal Service before it's too late?

Here's the best link: [warnockforgeorgia.org/save-the-usps](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/Save-the-US-Postal-Service?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-usps%3Fcode%3Djtk355-ja-nd-v2")**
This is really critical, so thank you in advance for using your voice.

Raphael
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e216/288179be/969f006/348e10be/363280305/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: Obama wants me to lose
body:
I don't know if you heard, but former president Barack Obama today endorsed my opponent, Rep. Rhetta Bowers. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/obama-8-3-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d82eb35ef5&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Team,

I don't know if you heard, but former president Barack Obama today endorsed my opponent, Rep. Rhetta Bowers.

It's not surprising given my opponent's extreme record for supporting Obama's most liberal policies... **like health care mandates and amnesty for illegal immigrants.**

Obama just made things that much clearer. **This race is a choice** — between the failed liberal policies Americans rejected last election, or the conservative reforms that have skyrocketed our stock market, strengthened our borders, and cut our taxes.
---
| [DONATE >>>](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=6a1259ecb9&e=4f010155df "DONATE >>>")
---
| Obama may be out of office, but he's far from gone. Obama's back on the political scene campaigning for his most loyal liberal allies, like my opponent.

_Obama and the Democratic Machine are investing in my defeat because they know that if my opponent wins, she'll do their bidding._ **They want to Turn Texas Blue and gerrymander Democrats into a decade of power.**

Last election we rejected the failed liberal policies that were forced upon us for eight years, and I'm afraid if we lose the Texas House, Democrats will repeal every one of our reforms and replace them with Obama's disastrous policies.

[Early voting in Texas begins in just 71 DAYS, and I need your help to fight back against Obama's loyal liberals who are pouring money into my defeat.](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=af3cc818ab&e=4f010155df)
---
| [DONATE >>>](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=ca94b3ca09&e=4f010155df "DONATE >>>")
---
| The former President's political resurgence is a stark reminder of how liberal Rhetta Bowers really is.

Time is running out, so please help me fight back today.

[Let's Keep Texas Red,](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=88c0acdf02&e=4f010155df)
---
|
---
| Will Douglas
_Republican Nominee for TX-HD-113_

|
---

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Exceptional
body:
Peter,Growing up in Sumner County, we didn't have a lot, but my parents made sure we learned the importance of Christian conservative values and the value of hard work. I'm running for the U.S. Senate to fight for the values that have made America so great and to protect them for my children and for yours. I wanted to make sure you saw my new ad below. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phjudit-fuutjhhtj-r/) **Watch "What Makes America Exceptional" [HERE](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phjudit-fuutjhhtj-y/).**As your next Senator, I will stand with President Donald Trump and Senator Marsha Blackburn to fight back against the angry liberal mob attempting to destroy the fabric of the America we love.

Thank you for your continued support. Bill Hagerty Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phjudit-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phjudit-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phjudit-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phjudit-fuutjhhtj-d/)

name: Dr. James St. George
subject: I Need Your Help
body:
Friend,We are less than 15 days away, **the election is coming to a close and we are in a great spot but we need your help again**. Please consider making another contribution to my campaign today to help us cross the finish line in this 10-way race.[**Any donation will be matched by me so your donation counts double.**](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhyjddd-ojijtnthh-r/) [DONATE NOW](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhyjddd-ojijtnthh-y/) Any amount is appreciated and I thank you for your support. **Together we can put people over politics and win this campaign!** You can donate directly online here: [https://www.votestgeorge.com/](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhyjddd-ojijtnthh-j/) or you can mail a check addressed to Friends of James St. George to the campaign PO Box 10313, Fleming Island, FL 32006.Thank you and God bless!Dr. James St. George [DONATE TODAY](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhyjddd-ojijtnthh-t/) | [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhyjddd-ojijtnthh-i/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhyjddd-ojijtnthh-d/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhyjddd-ojijtnthh-h/)

Physician, Businessman, Community Leader, Eagle Scout, Husband, Father, Christian, NRA-rated Marksman, Conservative, Republican... These are just a few of the words to describe Dr. James St. George. For more than a decade, James has served patients at his clinics throughout north Florida and played an active role in the medical community, helping to improve healthcare services throughout our area.

name: Tina Ramirez
subject: ❗️One Last Thing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
| | | Friend, _First of all, I want to thank my amazing supporters, generous donors, tireless volunteers, the Republican Party, and my relentlessly positive 5 year old, who stood by my side over the last year and a half of campaigning. _ Starting today, I will be coming together with other Seventh District conservatives to make sure we have the best possible shot to take down Abigail Spanberger on Election Day. But, before we move into this next phase of the campaign, _**I have one more request**_ : **Team Ramirez is working on closing the books on our primary campaign as quickly as possible, and anything you can contribute today to help offset my last remaining expenses would be greatly appreciated**. [**Please consider making a contribution today of $25, $250 -- even the FEC maximum of $2800 -- or any other amount you feel comfortable with. You can _CLICK HERE_ to contribute**.](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdkjhjd-udthdyhkil-i/) _I am proud of our campaign_. We did amazing things, _and I couldn't have done it without you_. Together let’s work on changing the party for the better, changing the country for the better, and fighting for our conservative values we hold dear. __**God Bless!**__ \-- Tina

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Friend, First of all, I want to thank my amazing supporters, generous donors, tireless volunteers, the Republican Party, and my relentlessly positive 5 year old, who stood by my side over the last year and a half of campaigning. Starting today, I will be coming together with other Seventh District conservatives to make sure we have the best possible shot to take down Abigail Spanberger on Election Day. But, before we move into this next phase of the campaign, I have one more request : Team Ramirez is working on closing the books on our primary campaign as quickly as possible, and anything you can contribute today to help offset my last remaining expenses would be greatly appreciated. I am proud of our campaign. We did amazing things, and I couldn't have done it without you. Together let’s work on changing the party for the better, changing the country for the better, and fighting for our conservative values we hold dear. God Bless! \-- Tina | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | |

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Fire Fauci.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
And stop bashing hydroxychloroquine. Here’s what I really think about this pandemic.
---
| |
---|---|---
| [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhjjjjk-ojdkijhkdh-y/) Friend,

I’ve had about enough of this guy Fauci.

Instead of having a plan to protect the most vulnerable among us and allowing us to get to herd immunity, he called for total lockdown. His plan did incredible damage to our economy. Fauci failed, and now he wants us to double down on failure again by completely destroying what’s left of our economy.

**If I’m President Trump, I call Dr. Fauci into the Board room and tell him, “You’re fired.”** [AGREE? SIGN OUR PETITION TO FIRE FAUCI](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhjjjjk-ojdkijhkdh-j/) But he’s not the only one who has been trigger-happy about locking people down. **Where do Facebook and Twitter get off freezing the accounts of doctors who advocate the use of hydroxychloroquine as a treatment option for patients?**

Hydroxychloroquine is a legitimate treatment option for doctors to use with patients. It’s not a silver bullet, but at the same time, I had a friend whose life was saved because of hydroxychloroquine. Remind me again, where did Mark Zuckerberg and Jack Dorsey get their MDs? They need to butt out of this conversation and let doctors work. **Friend, as a doctor, I’ve got a lot to say about the COVID-19 epidemic and the government’s response to it.** I haven’t been shy about sharing my opinions. But after the proposal of this latest lockdown, I am fired up. And I let loose at our most recent rally with Rand Paul: [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhjjjjk-ojdkijhkdh-t/) [WATCH DR. MANNY TELL IT LIKE IT IS](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhjjjjk-ojdkijhkdh-i/) Appreciate your support. Together, we’ll restore common sense to Washington.

Thank you,
Dr. Manny Sethi Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |
| |
| |
---|---|---

Dear Friend, Congress and the administration are still negotiating the next relief package, even though millions of Americans have already lost support and are now subject to eviction from their homes, and Congress is scheduled to leave town for its August recess at the end of the week. The expiration of benefits is not a surprise. The August recess wasn't put on the calendar in recent days. Congress (the Senate mostly) and the Administration have purposely allowed this to happen, to gain political leverage and force concessions. This game of brinkmanship has become business as usual in Washington. I'm not naive, I know politics will always be there, but politics should be secondary to governance, especially in a time of crisis. And the death toll has quietly passed 150,000. My opponent offers you business as usual. I think you deserve better. _**[Demand Better. name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Our fight has only just begun
body:
I wanted to take this moment to specifically thank the Working Hero PAC for their support, and for folks like you who’ve given our grassroots campaign the support it needed to succeed. It’s only together that we’ve been able to get to this point thus far.
---

The primary may be behind us, but our fight has just begun. We’re now looking towards making sure we’re set up to win in November’s general election, continuing conversations with constituents, in-depth policy research, supporting other progressives in upcoming key primaries, and so much more.
It’s not going to be easy to accomplish this, but I know that this team has been a part of making amazing things happen in the past. My candidacy is living proof of that -- and I know that together, we can work towards a brighter future.
_**By splitting a contribution today between my campaign and Working Hero, you’re supporting this critical work for a brighter future. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you’re able to?**_

**Jamaal Bowman**

body:

| Friend,
We just released a new ad, have you seen it?

| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R9aNvDJvizg3O6pKVyfYjeEC07CcdSgHSAqgQn-MC_P_vi5QKScmuapxJQjsgees3wIzG7cgZxU04KT1TZA1On9ZfmLjjjYKMubKGVqMS8SP20GR6XW6DxGZxekJG1bYOFj2rUU_kvUqmcUVatkMPaf8gXNlIHOmoX0Se9S6jtJ6IyaCtSfYhRWS9vzJLZfpHfbZhSPCT2Q=&c=p2-Bn78viYDYR-SvM4NFD8Vqulbsjx-X44Hlli9-Yj6kuI79llytGA==&ch=WSnpf1VXdGjf_NXuxlNuvUSCm6uulDs4TYuPS0q7ta2Te7Ed612qhw==)

| It shows how I will work with President Trump to build the wall, protect life, and defend the Second Amendment. I will not let the crazy liberals destroy our economy. We need fighters with grit in Congress to defend our conservative values.
[But I need your help to get there. Can you click here and chip in to help us get this ad in front of more voters?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R9aNvDJvizg3O6pKVyfYjeEC07CcdSgHSAqgQn-MC_P_vi5QKScmuU6O1R57sQh6CS1YVOCf4eEhN7CpRQRhDiFt6t8J86n-l14oenrcYn2ubPQu7UpBSr208JvAnnH42RTkQBRgQhg_n1cOAQDVQoZmhjGagZ2-Oi_uCt3U8zQ=&c=p2-Bn78viYDYR-SvM4NFD8Vqulbsjx-X44Hlli9-Yj6kuI79llytGA==&ch=WSnpf1VXdGjf_NXuxlNuvUSCm6uulDs4TYuPS0q7ta2Te7Ed612qhw==)
The campaign is going extremely well. I am statistically tied for first in polling. We have landed major national endorsements from leaders like Senator Rand Paul, the Tea Party Express, and Tea Party Patriots, and we have more local endorsements than anybody in this race.
[If you like the ad, please chip in to help us reach our goal of $25,000 before midnight.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R9aNvDJvizg3O6pKVyfYjeEC07CcdSgHSAqgQn-MC_P_vi5QKScmuU6O1R57sQh6CS1YVOCf4eEhN7CpRQRhDiFt6t8J86n-l14oenrcYn2ubPQu7UpBSr208JvAnnH42RTkQBRgQhg_n1cOAQDVQoZmhjGagZ2-Oi_uCt3U8zQ=&c=p2-Bn78viYDYR-SvM4NFD8Vqulbsjx-X44Hlli9-Yj6kuI79llytGA==&ch=WSnpf1VXdGjf_NXuxlNuvUSCm6uulDs4TYuPS0q7ta2Te7Ed612qhw==)
To victory,

|

|
Kat Cammack Constitutional conservative candidate for Congress, FL-03

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18539240/231805849/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGNhMjNkNi02M2Q2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9R-rlqyaz_igs80kTu2ntPOoW8MgVvTBBwwE2IQs98=&emci=8bca23d6-63d6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=8dca23d6-63d6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Folks, Mississippi now has the highest positivity rate of new COVID-19 cases than any other state in the country. This is the last thing we want our state to be #1 in, but it comes as little surprise given we lead the country in lack of access to affordable health care and medical resources. With morgues overflowing, Mississippi’s coroners are rationing test kits and calling in refrigerated trucks for backup. This is a gruesome fact that pains me to write. _It’s absolutely horrible._ Not only are cases and deaths surging, they’re also being massively underreported due to lack of resources or state regulation. **Coroners helplessly report that they’re there’s no guidance from state leaders on how to handle this crisis.** Accessing health care in Mississippi is already too difficult. Hospitals in rural communities continue to close, and we still haven’t expanded Medicaid. Black Mississippians are disproportionately impacted by lack of access to quality, affordable health care. Coronavirus has only made these problems worse. Meanwhile, Dr. Thomas Dobbs, the state health officer, said that it would be a mistake to open the schools now. We should listen to the medical doctors who are monitoring the data and adhering to science. Instead, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and Cindy Hyde-Smith have failed to pass any additional relief for unemployed workers, struggling families, frontline health care workers, or small businesses. There’s no national strategy for increasing access to tests or giving our schools the resources they need to safely teach our children. We need leadership and we need it fast. I’m calling on our state leaders and those in Washington like McConnell and Hyde-Smith to urgently provide a national testing plan, full unemployment benefits for those put out of work, funding for schools and hospitals, eviction relief, and a mask mandate here in Mississippi. [**If you’re with me and believe it’s time for these critical steps to address the pandemic, add your name alongside mine now to put pressure on those in power.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18539242/231805851/-108203668?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGNhMjNkNi02M2Q2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9R-rlqyaz_igs80kTu2ntPOoW8MgVvTBBwwE2IQs98=&emci=8bca23d6-63d6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=8dca23d6-63d6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18539244/231805853/-108203668?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGNhMjNkNi02M2Q2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9R-rlqyaz_igs80kTu2ntPOoW8MgVvTBBwwE2IQs98=&emci=8bca23d6-63d6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=8dca23d6-63d6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
---
With so many lives on the line, there’s no time to waste. We need action now.
– Mike

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Today is the day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Make sure to vote. | | | |
---
| | | Friends,

First things first, I want to thank you. The overwhelming support and kindness that has been shown to my family and I from Kansans across the state has been truly incredible. Election day is finally here and we could not have made it to this very important milestone without you.

If I could ask you for one more favor, it would be to take your friends and family with you to the polls today. Every single vote matters and this primary election is no exception. I will protect our Kansas values in Washington, D.C. I will not sit on the back row in Congress and just take up space. _**You can count on me to be leading on the issues of protecting life, the 2nd amendment and our national security.**_ You can count on me to support President Trump as he works to hold Communist China accountable for this terrible pandemic that has altered our lives in so many ways. And most of all, you can count on me to be someone with the integrity to be focused on you not scandals and do what I say I am going to do.

I hope I have earned your trust this past year as a conservative fighter who you can depend on to represent your values and actually get things done.

We can not risk sending a Republican into the general election in November who does not have what it takes to hold this seat and will give Nancy Pelosi another vote. I can absolutely get us across the finish line against the Democrat, but we must make it through the primary to see that happen.

I'm asking for your support in the primary election today.

God bless you!

Jake LaTurner

---
|

subject: Team Collins Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Dear Friend,

We're three months out from election day. 90 days to make a difference and show your support for Doug. Team Collins is all over Georgia building momentum. Doug spoke to packed rooms in Cobb County and Gwinnett County this weekend. The law enforcement community is rallying behind Doug with 41 Sheriffs publicly endorsing Doug. That list of support continues to grow. Can we add your name to our list of endorsements? (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/endorse)

CLICK HERE TO HELP US CONTACT VOTERS AND LET THEM KNOW TO VOTE FOR DOUG COLLINS. (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins)

**
------------------------------------------------------------

Last week, Georgia Sheriffs stood in support of Doug. Our brave law enforcement officers put their lives on the line every day, and Doug will keep fighting for them in the Senate! Click here to join Doug's Law Enforcement Coalition. (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/law_enforcement_for_doug)

A sellout crowd Saturday morning at the Cobb County GOP and Gwinnett County GOP. Folks are fired up to re-elect Donald Trump and send Doug Collins to the U.S. Senate!

Whether it's joining Doug at an upcoming event, contacting voters, or putting up a yard sign, we need your help! Visit our website (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins) or email us at grassroots@dougforgeorgia.com.

============================================================
DOUG IN THE NEWS
** D (https://accesswdun.com/article/2020/7/924509/collins-issues-more-support-for-law-enforcement-responds-to-criticism-from-loeffler)

"It's more than just simply saying, I support law enforcement, for me, it's about actually doing something and that's what we've been doing in Congress and that's what we're going to continue to do in this campaign trail,"

** For the full story click here. (https://accesswdun.com/article/2020/7/924509/collins-issues-more-support-for-law-enforcement-responds-to-criticism-from-loeffler)

** 41 GA Sheriffs Endorse Collins for Senate (https://mailchi.mp/9784bbaadaf1/made-out-like-a-bandit-172122)
"Public Safety professionals stand in the gap every day protecting our communities. They know what their communities need and the things that concern their citizens. Doug Collins supports the law enforcement community and we strongly endorse him as our next U.S. Senator."

** For the full story click here. (https://mailchi.mp/9784bbaadaf1/made-out-like-a-bandit-172122)

body:
|
#
Did you see Amy’s email yesterday, friend? President Barack Obama just endorsed Amy! This is an enormous vote of confidence in our grassroots movement to defeat Jeff Van Drew and send Amy to Congress. **We need to share President Obama’s endorsement with undecided voters across South Jersey. body:
The Trump administration’s efforts to undermine one of America’s most respected public servants, Dr. Anthony Fauci, is uncalled for and dangerous. Dr. Fauci has stood up to the administration and put the American people first despite the repeated criticisms from President Trump and members of his administration.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18541582/231849139/-940294256?refcode=080420-es-fauci-ja&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2Y2ZjlhYS03MWQ2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBm3r1epFKKm_TrRKFJIl1_Y9Z5pwP82kLCnI78m0OI=&emci=e4dea7db-cfd5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ccf6f9aa-71d6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)
Friend,

The Trump administration’s efforts to undermine one of America’s most respected public servants, Dr. Anthony Fauci, is uncalled for and dangerous.

Dr. Fauci has stood up to the administration and put the American people first despite the repeated criticisms from President Trump and members of his administration. He is speaking out to ensure we hear the truth about the coronavirus and letting us know what we should be doing to limit its spread. In other words, he’s doing his job.

**We can’t let the Trump administration destroy Dr. Fauci’s reputation in the midst of this crisis when the American people need trusted advice.**

**[Please, add your name today to say you stand with Dr. Fauci in the face of these outrageous attacks by the Trump administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18541583/231849140/1596879254?refcode=080420-es-fauci-ja&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2Y2ZjlhYS03MWQ2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBm3r1epFKKm_TrRKFJIl1_Y9Z5pwP82kLCnI78m0OI=&emci=e4dea7db-cfd5-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=ccf6f9aa-71d6-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)**

This pandemic is not a game: it’s a clear threat to our health, our economy, and the world. Now more than ever, we need to listen to public health officials like Dr. Fauci.

name: 2020 Vote-by-Mail Alert
subject: President Obama is 100% correct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Every single voice needs to be heard at the ballot box this November.
| | |
---
This is urgent, friend:**Republicans are attacking voting rights across the country and trying to BLOCK vote-by-mail in the midst of a pandemic - forcing Americans to choose between their health and their rights.**

The soul of our democracy is at stake, and we need to fight back immediately. That's why President Obama is counting on Democrats like you to speak out now, before it's too late:
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "http://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-vote-by-mail-obama?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk489-su-nd")
President Obama is 100% correct. EVERY single voice needs to be heard at the ballot box this November.
**But we need 192 more Democrats in Georgia to speak out by midnight, and your response is still missing. With the most important election of our lifetimes around the corner, please make your voice heard right now:**
| | **Will you stand with President Obama to demand universal vote-by-mail?**

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Going above and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We've got a chance to do even better.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e94/7f51f7bc/40d9cd1b/4ef7aee3/2784078090/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e94/7f51f7bc/40d9cd1b/4ef7aee2/2784078090/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.1nd__1846__&amount=10")
---
Here's the good news, Peter: We hit our one-day goal yesterday!

But here's the not-so-great news -- our momentum isn't _quite_ increasing at the rate we need. Hitting our goals is critical, but **we need to go above and beyond** to defeat a three-term senator who has corporate PACs on his side.

We need all of our team members to step up in new ways as we get closer and closer to November 3rd. **[Can we count on you to join* our donor team?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e94/7f51f7bc/40d9cd1b/4ef7aee2/2784078090/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.1nd__1846__&amount=10")**

We have an amazing chance to win Texas in less than three months, but to do it we'll need all hands on deck. On November 4th, we're all going to wake up either to the news that Sen. Cornyn will continue to stand in the way of progress -- or that Texas will have a senator ready to fight for the people. **[Help me make sure it's the latter.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e94/7f51f7bc/40d9cd1b/4ef7aee2/2784078090/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.1nd__1846__&amount=10")**
Thanks a million,
MJ

*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update.

name: Anna DeSenze
subject: Volunteers needed to save our Republic!!
body:
Hello Patriots,

Just recently I reached out to my local Republican Chair and asked if I am allowed to reach out to my neighbors reminding them to vote. I asked if there was a list of everyone in my precinct.

He said yes. I emailed most on the list and mailed the ones without emails. It has been extremely effective, the response I am receiving is absolutely amazing. They are all appreciative and thankful.

If any of you are willing to contact your neighbors please contact me. I will help you.
I have attached the letter I sent.

We must rise and fight for our community.

Sincerely,
Anna DeSenze
954-821-0110

name: Joe Biden
subject: My first August newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I hope you and your family are well. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d6481/1584972038/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/")
---
_Below is Joe Biden 's newsletter for August 4, 2020. Please submit questions and feedback [**here**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d6480/1584972038/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/newsletter-form?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1"). _
Peter,

I hope you and your family are well.

Once again, I can say that the last few weeks have been intense and, at times, painful.

The United States saw the largest drop in GDP since we began recording it. We passed 150,000 deaths from the coronavirus. And we lost two civil rights heroes, C.T. Vivian and John Lewis.

It's times like these when we are tested when it's more important than ever that we keep the faith that things will get better.

Jill and I were blessed to speak with our dear friend John Lewis one last time in his final days. Instead of answering our concerns for him, he asked about us. He asked us to stay focused on the work left undone to heal this nation.

Throughout his life, John taught us that while the journey toward equality is not easy, we must be unafraid and never cower and never, ever give up. It's up to all of us to carry on his mission.

We've got to keep the faith, and we've got to keep marching. So that's what I plan to do, and what I'm asking you to do with me.

In just a few weeks, we'll be celebrating the Democratic National Convention, and my running mate and I will humbly accept your formal nomination for President and Vice President of the United States. Then, it's full steam ahead each and every day until November!

When I say I'm honored to have you with me in this battle for the soul of the nation, Peter, I mean it. And I'm excited to share some of the things our campaign has been doing, and what we have in store.
**Campaign Updates**

We had an action-packed last few weeks of July. From policy rollouts to virtual and socially distanced conversations and more, this campaign is growing like never before. That's why, before I jump into more details, my team tells me I have to ask:

[**Can you make your first contribution to my campaign? Asking for your hard-earned dollars isn't my favorite part of this process, but it 's critical that we keep up the momentum as we head into the final stretch of this campaign.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| | [$5 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&express_lane=true")
---
| [$25 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=25&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&express_lane=true")

| [$50 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&express_lane=true")

| [$100 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=100&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&express_lane=true")

---
Now, on to the fun part. Last week we passed a major marker for this campaign, and there are now less than 100 days until Election Day. To celebrate, my team kicked off a 100 Days, 100 Ways to Help Joe Win the White House series. **Here 's one action that I hope you'll do today, if you haven't already: get the new Vote Joe app and talk with friends and family about why you're supporting my campaign. **
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d6571/1584972038/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/team-joe-app/?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")
I also announced the last two planks of my Build Back Better plan: **[building a 21st century caregiving and education workforce](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d656f/1584972038/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://medium.com/@JoeBiden/the-biden-plan-for-mobilizing-american-talent-and-heart-to-create-a-21st-century-caregiving-and-af5ba2a2dfeb") **and**[advancing racial equity.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d656c/1584972038/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://medium.com/@JoeBiden/the-biden-plan-to-build-back-better-by-advancing-racial-equity-across-the-american-economy-66ceb43d2a72") **

Even before the pandemic, millions of working families faced enormous financial and personal strains trying to raise their kids and care for their parents or loved ones living with a disability.

I understand. I've been a single parent. Even though I had more support than a lot of people going through tough times, I know how hard it is. When Jill and I got married, I saw how difficult it was for her to resume her teaching career while being a new mom. We cared for our parents to the end, my mom moved in with us, and our entire family cared for our Beau.

We know what so many of you are going through. While everything just feels different and we're just not sure if everything will be okay, I'm here to tell you that it can -- and it will -- be okay.

That's why the third part of my Build Back Better plan is about easing the squeeze on working families who are raising their kids and caring for aging loved ones. It is about making it easier for older Americans or people with disabilities to choose home-based or community-based care. And it's about creating jobs with better pay and career pathways for caregivers, and showing them the dignity and respect they deserve. You can click the image below to learn more about my caregiving plan, or click **[here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d656f/1584972038/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://medium.com/@JoeBiden/the-biden-plan-for-mobilizing-american-talent-and-heart-to-create-a-21st-century-caregiving-and-af5ba2a2dfeb"). **
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d656f/1584972038/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://medium.com/@JoeBiden/the-biden-plan-for-mobilizing-american-talent-and-heart-to-create-a-21st-century-caregiving-and-af5ba2a2dfeb")
And while each of my first three Build Back Better plans intentionally deal with systemic racism and advance racial equity in our economy, that isn't enough. That's why I announced the fourth plank of Build Back Better -- advancing racial economic equity across the American economy, not just as part of the other pillars of Build Back Better, but in its own right.

For generations, Americans who are Black, Brown, Asian American, Native American, or immigrants haven't always been fully included in our democracy or our economy. My bold, practical plan will help build a stronger, more just, more sustainable economy -- where everyone is included in the deal.

I'm incredibly proud of this plan and the historic investments we'll make if I am elected President. I hope you'll take a moment to read the full plan here:
| [READ THE PLAN >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d656c/1584972038/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://medium.com/@JoeBiden/the-biden-plan-to-build-back-better-by-advancing-racial-equity-across-the-american-economy-66ceb43d2a72")
---
And I couldn't leave out mentioning a true highlight of these past few months: getting to sit down with my good friend President Barack Obama for a socially distanced conversation. It had been too long since we've been able to see each other and discuss the significant moment we're in.

We talked about who we are as a nation, the crises we are going through right now, and how we can build back better. If you haven't watched it yet, you can see the full conversation here:
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d656b/1584972038/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r3hgsAXbvWc")
President Obama and I also took a few minutes to surprise some of my campaign's supporters to thank them for everything they're doing. We called people like Craig, a doctor who fought the Ebola outbreak and is now fighting the COVID-19 pandemic, and Arianna, who's been organizing food drives for her community during the COVID-19 crisis.
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d656b/1584972038/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r3hgsAXbvWc")
Calling supporters is one of my favorite things to do -- especially since it's one of the few ways I can speak with voters one-on-one right now. I'll be calling even more people soon to thank them for their grassroots donations, and I'd love to see your name on the list.

[**If you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today, I could be giving you a call soon! And who knows, maybe I 'll invite one of my friends, like President Obama or Elizabeth Warren, to join the call, too.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| | [$5 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&express_lane=true")

---
July 19 was also National Ice Cream Day -- a holiday I personally choose to celebrate every day. I can't wait until we can get back to celebrating over a cone, or any frozen treat, in person.
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d6559/1584972038/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/JoeBiden/status/1284978824749309952")
**What I 'm Reading**

[**" John Lewis: Together, You Can Redeem the Soul of Our Nation" \- New York Times**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d6556/1584972038/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/07/30/opinion/john-lewis-civil-rights-america.html")
Even after his passing, John Lewis reminds us that the most powerful symbol of what it means to be an American is what we do with the time we have to make real the promise of our nation. May his words guide us as we march on toward November.

[**" Inside a Houston Hospital During a Coronavirus Surge" \- The Atlantic**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d6554/1584972038/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.theatlantic.com/photo/2020/07/photos-inside-houston-hospital-during-coronavirus-surge/614773/")
This moving series of more than twenty photos from just one Texas hospital shows the real human toll of this virus. But it also shows the care and compassion of the doctors and nurses on the frontlines every day. We've got to do more to stop this virus, and to honor everyone who's putting themselves in danger to keep us safe.

[**" How Poetry Can Guide Us Through Trauma" \- The Atlantic**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d6552/1584972038/VEsEDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.theatlantic.com/culture/archive/2020/08/memorial-drive-poet-natasha-trethewey-on-grief/614848/")
Natasha Trethewey was appointed to be the U.S. poet laureate twice while I was Vice President -- in 2012 and again in 2013. I commend Natasha for her new, timely memoir about the death of her mother. Poetry has always been important to me. As a boy I turned to the great Irish poets when I was working on overcoming a stutter. I still turn to those poems when I need strength, and I know that poets and our poet laureates are a key part of our country's DNA. Words like Natasha's will be a critical part of our country's healing in the coming years, as we work to mend the soul of the nation.
**Hey Joe!**

**What advice would you give to college students about getting involved in the political process in America? How does a young voter turn this into a career? - Clayton in Austin, Texas **
Clayton, that's a great question, and one I completely understand because I also felt the call for public service at a young age. Before I was Vice President, before I was a Senator -- I started my career as an elected official on the New Castle County Council at the age of 28. So first I'll tell you this: you have to be ready to work for every vote. I won that first election by just 2,000 votes, and I've learned to never take a single vote for granted.

But here's some more practical advice: get involved any way that you can _right now_. Campaigning in 2020 may largely be virtual, but the folks you'll still meet volunteering on my campaign, with the Texas Democrats, or any campaign right now will go on to do big things -- and they'll teach you skills that will be critical for any political career. I hope my campaign is the one you'll volunteer with, and you can check out our [**Action Center**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d6550/1584972038/VEsEDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/take-action/?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1") for a lot of ways you can get involved.

**In 2021 the world will be dealing with the COVID economy coupled with addressing climate change. This will be a pair of nearly overwhelming challenges. Are you getting prepared to lead in a time of global crisis? - Frank in Bremerton, Washington **
Frank, you're exactly right. In 2021, the President will have to lead this country out of the public health crisis and the economic crisis deepened by President Trump's failure to control the virus, _and_ meet the climate crisis head-on. That's why, as part of my Build Back Better plan, I've committed to making historic investments in infrastructure and clean energy to create millions of new jobs and reduce our greenhouse gas emissions. We can rebuild our infrastructure _and_ create good, high-paying jobs that provide a choice to join a union. And we can do it fast. This will be one of my top priorities as President, and you can learn more about [**my plan to build a modern, sustainable infrastructure and an equitable clean energy future here.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d654e/1584972038/VEsFBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/clean-energy/?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")
**Spread the Faith**

Thirty years ago last week, we passed the Americans with Disabilities Act -- a critical source of opportunity, participation, self-sufficiency, and respect for the estimated 61 million American adults now living with a disability. To celebrate, President Barack Obama surprised disability rights activists at a virtual workshop they were holding. You can watch that video here:
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d654c/1584972038/VEsFBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/nowthisnews/status/1289147040476233728")
I will never forget the leadership and persistence of my friends Senator Tom Harkin, Senator Ted Kennedy, Congressman Major Owens, and Congressman Tony Coelho, who teamed up to create the ADA against long odds and determined opposition. Nor will I forget the moment just after it passed, when Senator Harkin delivered a speech from the Senate floor in American Sign Language as a tribute to his older brother, Frank, who was deaf. I was immensely proud to cosponsor that bill.

If I have the honor of becoming President, every policy I pursue -- from rebuilding our middle class, to fighting climate change, to achieving universal health coverage -- will be created with the full inclusion and dignity of Americans with disabilities in mind.

You can read more about my Plan for Full Participation and Equality for People with Disabilities here:
| [READ THE PLAN >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d654a/1584972038/VEsFBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://medium.com/@JoeBiden/my-statement-on-the-30th-anniversary-of-the-americans-with-disabilities-act-7cb340cfe223")

**What 's Coming**

This month is a big one, Peter.

I'll be announcing my running mate very soon. We've got an incredible, diverse pool of candidates, and I can't wait to share my historic choice with you. In fact, if you've made it this far into my newsletter, I want to make sure you're one of the first people to know who my Vice President will be. If you sign up here, my team will make sure you get the news as soon as possible:
| [BE THE FIRST TO KNOW JOE'S VP CHOICE >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba48/1cd0ac28/17b0c03f6/357d6548/1584972038/VEsFBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/petition-first-to-know-vp-pick?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.08.04_B1_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")

We'll showcase the strength and unity of our party, my Vice President and I will accept your official nomination, and we'll formally kick off the general election.

And already, my advertising team has announced we're expanding our advertising efforts into Ohio, marking the ninth battleground state where we'll be up on the air with ads. We'll keep playing this ad and making sure voters understand the difference between Donald Trump -- who's only out for himself -- and me -- who always has and always will fight for working families. clean_body: I hope you and your family are well. | | "" Below is Joe Biden 's newsletter for August 4, 2020. Please submit questions and feedback "". Peter, I hope you and your family are well. Once again, I can say that the last few weeks have been intense and, at times, painful. The United States saw the largest drop in GDP since we began recording it. We passed 150,000 deaths from the coronavirus. And we lost two civil rights heroes, C.T. Vivian and John Lewis. It's times like these when we are tested when it's more important than ever that we keep the faith that things will get better. Jill and I were blessed to speak with our dear friend John Lewis one last time in his final days. Instead of answering our concerns for him, he asked about us. He asked us to stay focused on the work left undone to heal this nation. Throughout his life, John taught us that while the journey toward equality is not easy, we must be unafraid and never cower and never, ever give up. It's up to all of us to carry on his mission. We've got to keep the faith, and we've got to keep marching. So that's what I plan to do, and what I'm asking you to do with me. In just a few weeks, we'll be celebrating the Democratic National Convention, and my running mate and I will humbly accept your formal nomination for President and Vice President of the United States. Then, it's full steam ahead each and every day until November! When I say I'm honored to have you with me in this battle for the soul of the nation, Peter, I mean it. And I'm excited to share some of the things our campaign has been doing, and what we have in store. Campaign Updates We had an action-packed last few weeks of July. From policy rollouts to virtual and socially distanced conversations and more, this campaign is growing like never before. That's why, before I jump into more details, my team tells me I have to ask: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Now, on to the fun part. Last week we passed a major marker for this campaign, and there are now less than 100 days until Election Day. To celebrate, my team kicked off a 100 Days, 100 Ways to Help Joe Win the White House series. Here 's one action that I hope you'll do today, if you haven't already: get the new Vote Joe app and talk with friends and family about why you're supporting my campaign. "" I also announced the last two planks of my Build Back Better plan: "" and "" Even before the pandemic, millions of working families faced enormous financial and personal strains trying to raise their kids and care for their parents or loved ones living with a disability. I understand. I've been a single parent. Even though I had more support than a lot of people going through tough times, I know how hard it is. When Jill and I got married, I saw how difficult it was for her to resume her teaching career while being a new mom. We cared for our parents to the end, my mom moved in with us, and our entire family cared for our Beau. We know what so many of you are going through. While everything just feels different and we're just not sure if everything will be okay, I'm here to tell you that it can -- and it will -- be okay. That's why the third part of my Build Back Better plan is about easing the squeeze on working families who are raising their kids and caring for aging loved ones. It is about making it easier for older Americans or people with disabilities to choose home-based or community-based care. And it's about creating jobs with better pay and career pathways for caregivers, and showing them the dignity and respect they deserve. You can click the image below to learn more about my caregiving plan, or click "". "" And while each of my first three Build Back Better plans intentionally deal with systemic racism and advance racial equity in our economy, that isn't enough. That's why I announced the fourth plank of Build Back Better -- advancing racial economic equity across the American economy, not just as part of the other pillars of Build Back Better, but in its own right. For generations, Americans who are Black, Brown, Asian American, Native American, or immigrants haven't always been fully included in our democracy or our economy. My bold, practical plan will help build a stronger, more just, more sustainable economy -- where everyone is included in the deal. I'm incredibly proud of this plan and the historic investments we'll make if I am elected President. I hope you'll take a moment to read the full plan here: | "" And I couldn't leave out mentioning a true highlight of these past few months: getting to sit down with my good friend President Barack Obama for a socially distanced conversation. It had been too long since we've been able to see each other and discuss the significant moment we're in. We talked about who we are as a nation, the crises we are going through right now, and how we can build back better. If you haven't watched it yet, you can see the full conversation here: "" President Obama and I also took a few minutes to surprise some of my campaign's supporters to thank them for everything they're doing. We called people like Craig, a doctor who fought the Ebola outbreak and is now fighting the COVID-19 pandemic, and Arianna, who's been organizing food drives for her community during the COVID-19 crisis. "" Calling supporters is one of my favorite things to do -- especially since it's one of the few ways I can speak with voters one-on-one right now. I'll be calling even more people soon to thank them for their grassroots donations, and I'd love to see your name on the list. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" July 19 was also National Ice Cream Day -- a holiday I personally choose to celebrate every day. I can't wait until we can get back to celebrating over a cone, or any frozen treat, in person. "" What I 'm Reading "" Even after his passing, John Lewis reminds us that the most powerful symbol of what it means to be an American is what we do with the time we have to make real the promise of our nation. May his words guide us as we march on toward November. "" This moving series of more than twenty photos from just one Texas hospital shows the real human toll of this virus. But it also shows the care and compassion of the doctors and nurses on the frontlines every day. We've got to do more to stop this virus, and to honor everyone who's putting themselves in danger to keep us safe. "" Natasha Trethewey was appointed to be the U.S. poet laureate twice while I was Vice President -- in 2012 and again in 2013. I commend Natasha for her new, timely memoir about the death of her mother. Poetry has always been important to me. As a boy I turned to the great Irish poets when I was working on overcoming a stutter. We'll showcase the strength and unity of our party, my Vice President and I will accept your official nomination, and we'll formally kick off the general election. And already, my advertising team has announced we're expanding our advertising efforts into Ohio, marking the ninth battleground state where we'll be up on the air with ads. We'll keep playing this ad and making sure voters understand the difference between Donald Trump -- who's only out for himself -- and me -- who always has and always will fight for working families. This is one of my favorite ads we've put out, and you can watch it here: "" Peter, August really is, as my coach used to say, "go time." As you can see, we've got big plans for the month, but it's going to take a lot of resources to pull them off. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" That's all we've got for today, Peter. Thank you so much for your support, for taking the time to read this, and for believing in this campaign. We've got less than three months until Election Day, and voting in some states begins even sooner than that. So what we do today really matters. Every time you chip in a few bucks, make some calls, or talk to your friends about what we're fighting for, you're helping power us to victory in November. So thank you, Peter. I really mean it. Take care, Joe | "" | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: David Perdue's "Boardroom" donor program
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
It's actually called "The Boardroom." |
---
Friend -- I lead a team of journalists who investigate and expose corruption for news organizations all over the world.

**These anti-corruption investigations often require my colleagues to go undercover. But friend, in American politics today, the corruption is right out in the open.**

Take my opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue. **He has a donor program literally called _"The Boardroom,"_ whereby he offers corporate lobbyists an ornate menu of special access to the Senator -- for a price, of course.**

For $7,500 a year, a "chairman" level corporate donor receives quarterly events with Perdue, a yearly resort retreat on the private island where the Senator lives, and an annual reception at Perdue's lavish island residence.

**[Friend, David Perdue's blatant pay-to-play corruption must end. Chip in $20 to help me defeat him.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20ec/5b2c1286/3e49bb68/25f1317b/2917076244/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_04_crpt1&amount=20")** | | [Chip in $20 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20ec/5b2c1286/3e49bb68/25f1317b/2917076244/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_04_crpt1&amount=20")
---
**Friend, David Perdue's elite "Boardroom" donor events even take priority over his _actual Senate work_.**

Last year, the Senate Armed Services subcommittee held a key hearing over substandard and unhealthy housing at military bases, including Georgia's own Ft. Benning.

_Every subcommittee member was there -- except David Perdue._

**While military families were testifying before his subcommittee about threats to their health and safety, David Perdue was at a "Boardroom" meeting wining and dining corporate donors and lobbyists.**

**Friend, I am running for Senate to clean up the mess that corrupt officials like David Perdue have made.**

_(And I hope it goes without saying that I won't skip out on committee hearings to sell favors to corporate donors. In fact, I'm refusing donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists.)_

**[Today, if you're ready for a Senator from Georgia who will fight corruption, please chip in $20 to my campaign>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20ec/5b2c1286/3e49bb68/25f1317b/2917076244/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_04_crpt1&amount=20")**

subject: ** Day of Action – August 15th **
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Let’s defeat Jeanne Shaheen & protect our Senate majority! Sign up now >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/19ee69104ca6a41d/ef4a9e443d9969b2c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, This is a VITAL effort. I’m reaching out today to ask for your help.

With just weeks until the primary – and just 91 days until November 3rd – **we're going to be holding a Day of Action on Saturday, August 15th!**

We’re looking for supporters to step up across the Granite State, to participate in phone banks and door-knocking to help remind folks of all that’s at stake in this election. [>> Sign up HERE to join our Grassroots Victory Team for this Day of Action! <<< /span>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/19ee69104ca6a41d/d864d0299c68bca0c3d6b838967d376c/33153) The Democrats know that Jeanne Shaheen is vulnerable, and they’re going to pour in MILLIONS to protect this seat. It’s critical that we keep up the pressure.

We’re 100% committed to outworking the Democrats to WIN... and your involvement is crucial to this effort!

[**Complete this form today**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/19ee69104ca6a41d/a4d391f6d0e5594dc3d6b838967d376c/33153), and my campaign’s Field Director will get in touch with you directly, to provide details on what we have planned for August 15th.

I hope you see your name on our list of Day of Action volunteers!

\- Corky [Join Our Grassroots Victory Team! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/19ee69104ca6a41d/5c823d037a00f3c7c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/19ee69104ca6a41d/fd7cd4cf12ac5af6c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/19ee69104ca6a41d/13fd56b03389c8b7c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Team Kat
subject: We NEED you
body:
Join Team Kat today!
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,
Thank you for supporting Kat's Campaign!
To date, our grassroots team has knocked over 10,000 doors and called 175,000 voters. We are incredibly proud of the hard work we've done in conjunction with all of our volunteers.
We are especially happy to see our efforts paying off. Kat is currently tied for first in the polls, has raised the most from within the district, and has received the most local endorsements.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q3myZ0u3TrFahatVP2dhVldL94ne_zxjEc7nIkm77evwGcTjjdpxEdWuqDh55IYX478sv9cixsDEcW4C9t7nqyGPwvr9egc8J8QKTtcZeuZkjjD9j4H7tPZdptYh1ssx7LXFnCEmCois2DXy7iE5M1MqXqvfRD_Sw4-ncy7zVS4=&c=8qvixfvQ5pP6KuxMgIf5kaWvRL_rgdfxRHjffVzgFkDbnl6tmvz-0Q==&ch=RTJ3ffV-yXtzcygwmRG3aNMZ0IuLTzjhHCJpFUIvOA1SGlAXlWUf_g==)

| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q3myZ0u3TrFahatVP2dhVldL94ne_zxjEc7nIkm77evwGcTjjdpxEdWuqDh55IYX478sv9cixsDEcW4C9t7nqyGPwvr9egc8J8QKTtcZeuZkjjD9j4H7tPZdptYh1ssx7LXFnCEmCois2DXy7iE5M1MqXqvfRD_Sw4-ncy7zVS4=&c=8qvixfvQ5pP6KuxMgIf5kaWvRL_rgdfxRHjffVzgFkDbnl6tmvz-0Q==&ch=RTJ3ffV-yXtzcygwmRG3aNMZ0IuLTzjhHCJpFUIvOA1SGlAXlWUf_g==)
---
| There are only two weeks left until election day, and the momentum is on our side.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Telehealth Revolution Is Here to Stay
body:
With outdated regulatory hurdles cleared, the telehealth revolution will be “a key part of President Trump’s healthcare vision" | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4ed0b22ab&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Telehealth Revolution Is Here to Stay**

“In just weeks, Americans went from using telehealth—carrying out medical appointments over virtual connections rather than in person—in a relatively narrow set of circumstances to making it one of the most common ways to receive healthcare,” Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar writes in _USA Today_.

With outdated regulatory hurdles cleared, the telehealth revolution will be “a key part of President Trump’s healthcare vision: an affordable, personalized system that puts you in control, provides peace of mind and treats you like a human being, not a number.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6598792149&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Spanning at least the past couple of decades, no president has done more for conservation than President Trump. The Great American Outdoors Act alone”—which the President just signed—“is one of the greatest conservation achievements in U.S. history,” U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service Director Aurelia Skipwith writes in the [_Clarion Ledger_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7a2b92b60&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A former MSNBC producer wrote a scathing open letter explaining why she recently left the cable news network,” Joseph Wulfsohn reports. “Important facts or studies get buried,” Ariana Pekary says. “The model blocks diversity of thought and content because the networks have incentive to amplify fringe voices.” Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=516fa73bc0&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The police chief in Seattle is urging elected officials to discourage anti-police demonstrations that have taken place over the last several weeks after protesters targeted her home over the weekend,” Dominick Mastrangelo reports. “Before this devolves into the new way of doing business by mob rule here in Seattle, and across the nation, elected officials like you must forcefully call for the end of these tactics,” Police Chief Carmen Best wrote to City Council. Read more in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0dcb0ec16&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39dedc63fa&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=20b761fd65&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=72ffbf4b3a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4554fcd1d3d2/a-major-endorsement?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
**I am so proud to announce that End Citizens United has endorsed our campaign!**

** ** As I find myself saying so often on the campaign trail, campaign finance
reform is the key to making Congress work for the American people. Too
often, legislation that would improve the lives of millions of Americans
never sees the light of day because politicians do the bidding of their
corporate donors. **Ending the influence of big money in our elections is crucial to our democracy. ** [Click here to chip in and help us fight back against the corporate special interests!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6b6f5add49&e=140a9b81e7)

My opponent is a perfect example of all that is wrong with our campaign finance system. **Almost 96% of the money Adam Kinzinger has raised has come from corporations and wealthy donors.** It's no wonder he's voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act 54 times and voted against lowering prescription drug costs. Health insurance companies and the pharmaceutical industry dump tons of money into his campaign in order to buy his votes.

**To read about why campaign finance reform means so much to me,[click here.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=5a7f5ad77f&e=140a9b81e7) **

You can count on me to never accept a penny of corporate PAC money. In
fact, over 92% of the money raised on this campaign has come from small,
individual contributions. **My campaign is powered by people like you, not
by special interests.**

In order to make sure Kinzinger's dark money doesn't drown out our message, [I need you to make a contribution to help us fight back. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=075edea361&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

body:
Friends, Thank you so much for supporting our campaign to send Tiffany to Washington to take on the radical left. If you haven’t voted yet, _**today is the last day you can do so.**_ **THE POLLS ARE OPEN UNTIL 7 PM!** There’s still time to find your polling place and head out to vote. **[Find your polling place NOW>>>](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=4e260cfacd504d4f993a91777be0df18&_e=KbvOE6ZKd1KuZRW89xFp-90sbmbxPO94shpbOOtBKAv_3Xt-LzIHj3Ff2E1g9dwfO5N9SWGPcAHn2ZOcE7QsGEVmJZaUy79dWbxTY0OO9D9NYQ7xEd2J0MeM8x5Xl3hYfcFi3SqZyYD-3RazrgJe53W8ou6FWg8aoBZbn_asg92BLMrbMKH0X6RbXKCAapYVsHDdgByZuWf38MxCj2RQyr_0NMHPWtkqxMes-LrdjMe0zRkI_xv3jR8DHZKcI50lwzDLrJhos2k9FKjXAIGuNp1p7ySM6cspqBWr6tK8HWw%3D)** If you have already voted by mail, make sure to track your ballot ASAP and confirm its arrival. **[Track your ballot HERE>>>](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=4e260cfacd504d4f993a91777be0df18&_e=KbvOE6ZKd1KuZRW89xFp-90sbmbxPO94shpbOOtBKAtllj4voE8sjiQ1ozE0hFqR5nkqvQcSTcmA4z2VXuURElM5rB_tybozSHvb0q_dan1jzC7feHxok84Zym-a_FTWLEspk8q_bhIXBqnLR_aUMwtDIje1dwoNMR30DghxXcW5xY7Hn2jHjdr1D40ZC51Nif8qLUqmWC_s1BI7O6oCGvHgaXz9XDpwcxdl4jud38hbm-E5YWDwIrJiHlOYydgjL39waboMU3-FUl-6pXfrT5OjyHsBPKwB7x4vf0AbgYA%3D)** The polls are open until 7 p.m. tonight. clean_body: Friends, Thank you so much for supporting our campaign to send Tiffany to Washington to take on the radical left. If you haven’t voted yet, today is the last day you can do so. THE POLLS ARE OPEN UNTIL 7 PM! There’s still time to find your polling place and head out to vote. If you have already voted by mail, make sure to track your ballot ASAP and confirm its arrival. The polls are open until 7 p.m. tonight. Head to the polls and vote for Tiffany Shedd NOW. Please share these links with friends and encourage them to vote for Tiffany TODAY! Thank you, Team Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: 2020 Democratic Convention is in 10 days. Tell us what you think.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| We're officially in August, and that means that in less than two weeks Joe Biden will pick his running mate in the most important election of our lives.

We know that no matter who he chooses, our Democratic ticket, unlike the Republican Trump-Pence ticket, will be one committed to our core democratic values and to making this country work for everyone. But, given how much is at stake, we want to know what you think:

[**_Let us know who you think should join Biden in defeating Trump and Pence this November!_**](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de916ef/70cdc2ba/45b5fbf1/3912349/1563593503/VEsH/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/vp-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Let+us+know+who+you+think+should+join+Bi&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_SV_REACTIVATE_180DO_200804_1_2&source=CVH_EM_SV_REACTIVATE_180DO_200804_1_2") [WHO SHOULD BE OUR VICE PRESIDENTIAL NOMINEE?](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de916ef/70cdc2ba/45b5fbf1/3912346/1563593503/VEsE/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/vp-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+WHO+SHOULD+BE+OUR+VICE+PRESIDENTIAL+NOMI&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_SV_REACTIVATE_180DO_200804_1_2&source=CVH_EM_SV_REACTIVATE_180DO_200804_1_2") No matter who Biden ultimately chooses to be Vice President, there will always be those who disagree. It's critical that Democrats ultimately stand strong and united against the GOP's corruption, fear-mongering, and their smear campaigns.

We must never forget that in the greatest public health disaster in a century and biggest economic collapse since the Great Depression, Congressional Republicans and the White House turned their backs on those most in need -- they let enhanced employment and eviction protections expire and have failed miserably to coordinate ANY national COVID-19 response!

Their inaction has cost lives -- and will cause further deaths and suffering. There is no bottom to their depravity, and that's why we must keep fighting.

[**_AHEAD OF THE 2020 CONVENTION -- Will you take 30 seconds to provide critical feedback to Chris?_**](https://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de916ef/70cdc2ba/45b5fbf1/3912347/1563593503/VEsF/?g=PT9eB2V4ADlVXspjkuyiHMA "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/vp-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+AHEAD+OF+THE+2020+CONVENTION+mdash+Will+&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_SV_REACTIVATE_180DO_200804_1_2&source=CVH_EM_SV_REACTIVATE_180DO_200804_1_2")

Thank you,

Team Van Hollen

---
Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
---

10605 Concord Street, Suite 202

name: =?utf-8?Q?Donald=20Trump=20Jr.?=
subject: re: My MAGA Candidate of the Week
body:
I've got a big announcement.And I know it's going to trigger the left.I just picked my MAGA Candidate of the week and it's Nancy Mace in South... | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/7d98e6077752/how-we-flip-the-house-2088298?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=7bbeea2f83&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Friends,

I've got a big announcement.

_And I know it's going to trigger the left._

**I just picked my MAGA Candidate of the week and it's Nancy Mace in South Carolina - and she's Speaker Pelosi's worst nightmare. **

_She's a pro-life, pro-Constitution, pro-2nd Amendment, conservative woman. And she loves my dad. _

That's why I want her in Congress. Will you help me get her there by chipping in now?
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8e1a9d854d&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [>>> SUPPORT THE MAGA CANDIDATE OF THE WEEK >>>](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=6c2e5914e4&e=f1831b4ca2 ">>> SUPPORT THE MAGA CANDIDATE OF THE WEEK >>>")
---
| _My MAGA Candidates always represent the very best that the Republican Party has to offer. And they are all running in seats that we MUST WIN if we want to prevent America from becoming a socialist country. _

There's no doubt about it, Nancy's district — SC-01 — is a tough race. **But I know it's actually one of our best chances to succeed this year.**
---
| [SUPPORT MAGA CANDIDATE OF THE WEEK, NANCY MACE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=66e2134478&e=f1831b4ca2 "SUPPORT MAGA CANDIDATE OF THE WEEK, NANCY MACE")
---
| As you might know, the left won Nancy’s South Carolina district for the **FIRST TIME in 40 years** in 2018. _There’s no doubt about it — this seat should be in Republican hands. _

**And in 2020, I know we're going to take it right back.** We've got a strong candidate and we've got momentum on our side.

_But make no mistake, the left isn't going to accept their defeat easily._

They're going to come after us with everything they've got. They need to beat Nancy in order to force their radical, socialist agenda down the throats of Americans.

I know Nancy won’t back down from their attacks -- but she could use your support now to stay strong till November.

**That’s why I hope you will join me to support my MAGA Candidate of the Week by chipping in now:[ https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-2088298/](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=887538864e&e=f1831b4ca2)**

Thank you for your support,

Let’s win this thing.
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b152746967&e=f1831b4ca2)
