name: Biden for President
subject: Questionnaire for the Democratic National Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We're less than two weeks away from the start of the Democratic National Convention. |
---
Peter, we're less than two weeks away from the start of the Democratic National Convention, where Joe will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President!

We know how excited everyone is to see Democrats across the country join forces to beat Donald Trump!

Convention Week is going to be an amazing time to see all of our hard work come together -- and we hope you'll join us virtually for some of the action!

**And since this is a great time to check-in and make sure we have an updated supporter record for you, we have a brand new, short questionnaire about Democratic issues and priorities for you to take.**

[**Will you take a few seconds to take our new survey today so we have some updated information about your issue priorities before the Convention starts?**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6059/3630651153/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS") | **Convention Attendee Issue Survey**

**Name:** Peter Willis
**Date:** 8/4/2020
---
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6058/3630651153/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS")
| [BEGIN SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6058/3630651153/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS")
---
Over the Convention's four days, we'll hear from Democrats across the country, nominate Joe Biden and his running mate as our official ticket for President and Vice President of the United States, and show the world our strong, unified party.

But after the Convention, Peter, the real work begins. We'll be jumping headfirst into the most crucial months of this race, so we need to make sure we include feedback from folks across the country about what issues are on the ballot this November.

That's why we're asking you to take our survey. We know we ask for your feedback a lot, but it's all to make sure our campaign continues to reflect the people it belongs to (that's you, Peter!).

**So, if you could take a couple of minutes today to make sure your record is up to date by answering a few short questions on our Convention Attendee Issue Survey, we 'd be so grateful for your response! Click below to begin the survey:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Convention-Attendee-Issue-Survey**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6059/3630651153/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS")

Thanks for everything you do,

Biden for President
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6057/3630651153/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6056/3630651153/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6055/3630651153/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6054/3630651153/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6053/3630651153/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6052/3630651153/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6051/3630651153/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6050/3630651153/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d604f/3630651153/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d604e/3630651153/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6051/3630651153/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d604d/3630651153/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d6050/3630651153/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba46/1cd0ac28/17b129b36/357d604c/3630651153/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

| **Friend -- I’m afraid I have bad news to share.**

We finally finished tabulating the amount of money raised for our July fundraising goal... **and unfortunately, we didn’t hit our target.**

This is a concerning start to the month of August, friend. With less than three months until the election, every investment matters more than ever -- _and every shortfall will make a bigger impact on our campaign than before._

We still have a chance to regain the ground we’ve lost. [**But that hinges on you chipping in right now to ensure we get back on track. Can we count on you to do that?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18545581/231935127/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.04_mg_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTliYThkZC05MWQ2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsPW9maOSCrt5QDaQJozSA91R3RG3Slu_1_fmLkYCS8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18545584/231935130/-1290848981?express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2020.08.04_mg_b1_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTliYThkZC05MWQ2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsPW9maOSCrt5QDaQJozSA91R3RG3Slu_1_fmLkYCS8=)

subject: Facebook’s censorship of conservatives

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uTwzj4XHTi-YMrQv4fehCjBkvOq35sK0wc-nwmR1pXJURj0ri-_GWe5kXOGnkbZt6gLZKjdbV5GU_Ri6ahtVGgsDPV4ejTVdEjJYmZ8MJLCUAWjb6hVK1iQIDmsGkigZZmNMsqhwmYXgJDBT5hnG9V9PLN2Bc5D_b7Y6Hst8CDKUyd-ejNlo92ZdnE97kbnh&c=9Ta1tw558t4dFJgSSaNXk_QpFYKm0TDobkt5YJMeb79PzOHeZb44Fw==&ch=WVxevie0dDBnrKNFNVdv2r7V9bgzbpiH2r9SuU9pSt6JHHyBLJwsMg==)

| Peter,
There is a growing problem with censorship in our country. One of America's founding principles is the freedom of speech, yet Facebook is actively censoring conservative groups and pro-Trump posts.
Back in April, Mark Zuckerberg told Congress that his company doesn't engage in bias against conservative speech, but we know this to be false. That's why I filed a criminal complaint against Zuckerberg for making false statements while under oath.
Just look at [Facebook's record](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uTwzj4XHTi-YMrQv4fehCjBkvOq35sK0wc-nwmR1pXJURj0ri-_GWe5kXOGnkbZt6gLZKjdbV5GU_Ri6ahtVGgsDPV4ejTVdEjJYmZ8MJLCUAWjb6hVK1iQIDmsGkigZZmNMsqhwmYXgJDBT5hnG9V9PLN2Bc5D_b7Y6Hst8CDKUyd-ejNlo92ZdnE97kbnh&c=9Ta1tw558t4dFJgSSaNXk_QpFYKm0TDobkt5YJMeb79PzOHeZb44Fw==&ch=WVxevie0dDBnrKNFNVdv2r7V9bgzbpiH2r9SuU9pSt6JHHyBLJwsMg==):

* Removed a number of President Trump's posts over the past few months.
* Employees acknowledged that they banned pro-life ads in 2018.
* Facebook exec Palmer Luckey was fired after making a donation to a group that opposed Hillary Clinton in 2016.

[It's time we hold Facebook accountable.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uTwzj4XHTi-YMrQv4fehCjBkvOq35sK0wc-nwmR1pXJURj0ri-_GWe5kXOGnkbZt6gLZKjdbV5GU_Ri6ahtVGgsDPV4ejTVdEjJYmZ8MJLCUAWjb6hVK1iQIDmsGkigZZmNMsqhwmYXgJDBT5hnG9V9PLN2Bc5D_b7Y6Hst8CDKUyd-ejNlo92ZdnE97kbnh&c=9Ta1tw558t4dFJgSSaNXk_QpFYKm0TDobkt5YJMeb79PzOHeZb44Fw==&ch=WVxevie0dDBnrKNFNVdv2r7V9bgzbpiH2r9SuU9pSt6JHHyBLJwsMg==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, There is a growing problem with censorship in our country. One of America's founding principles is the freedom of speech, yet Facebook is actively censoring conservative groups and pro-Trump posts. Back in April, Mark Zuckerberg told Congress that his company doesn't engage in bias against conservative speech, but we know this to be false. That's why I filed a criminal complaint against Zuckerberg for making false statements while under oath. Just look at ==: Removed a number of President Trump's posts over the past few months. Employees acknowledged that they banned pro-life ads in 2018. * Facebook exec Palmer Luckey was fired after making a donation to a group that opposed Hillary Clinton in 2016. == | == | | | == | With Big Tech out to influence our elections, it's time that Patriots like you and me fight back! We cannot sit by and let Mark Zuckerberg determine our country's politics. The Silent Majority can be silent no longer. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Get Out and Vote
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/get-out-and-vote?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# Today’s the day!

Running for the U.S. Senate and spending time with people all across Kansas has been my honor. Traveling across our state has shown how much Kansans want a businessman in the Senate. A senator who wants to step up and go to Washington and serve, not look at the next rung on the ladder. I will be the senator who returns government to We The People!

I want to remind you to get out and vote today. The polls are open until 7 p.m. across our state. You can find [your polling place here](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=40e6c09112&e=41f8e27552). Voting is quick and easy and election officials are giving each voter a fresh pen to vote with.

Also please remind your family and friends to vote and mention why you support our campaign. Call, text, email, use social media. Share our social media ([Facebook](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=39a25d3be3&e=41f8e27552), [Twitter](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=0d9d1ad229&e=41f8e27552), [Instagram](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=72c131047f&e=41f8e27552)) on your social media. Share our [endorsement from the _Wichita Eagle_](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=7fba2687ec&e=41f8e27552).

If everyone on our team reaches out to a couple of people it can help move us into the end zone.

With your help we can win tonight and defeat Barbara Bollier in November.

Dave

_P.S. – Please join us for our watch party tonight. Doors open at 6:30 and details below._

# Kanza Hall
7300 W. 119 St.
Overland Park, KS

name: Sandy Smith
subject: The socialist hypocrisy!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gM0d.Mm0z3Nxmng&b=qeQ0XP4mrcKsiDzxqOtgGg)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief.
I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed.
_**Herman Cain is a hero- and his American Dream is one for the history books**_. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats.
**_Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. _**
But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred:

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief. I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed. Herman Cain is a hero- and his American Dream is one for the history books. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats. Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred: We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. Now they rejoice in the death of one of the most prominent black politicians of the 21st Century. What can we learn from this? The radical Left doesn't care who you are. AOC and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. name: MJ Hegar Finance Team
subject: Tough fights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
MJ expects a lot from her team.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e90/7f51f7bc/40dc7829/4ef7af9f/3267165663/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter -- wanted to be sure you saw this note from MJ.

We _just_ hit our one-day goal yesterday, but we can't settle for just good enough. To win this race, we've got to go above and beyond. **[Can you pitch in $3 to help us win this fight?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e90/7f51f7bc/40dc7829/4ef7af9d/3267165663/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.2nd__1848__&amount=3")**

MJ is used to tough fights, and she expects a lot from her team. Let's make sure she's got the backup she needs.

\-- Team MJ
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar**
Subject: Going above and beyond
> | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e90/7f51f7bc/40dc7829/4ef7af93/3267165663/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.2nd__1848__&amount=10")
> ---
> Here's the good news, team: We hit our one-day goal yesterday!
>
> But here's the not-so-great news -- our momentum isn't _quite_ increasing at the rate we need. Hitting our goals is critical, but **we need to go above and beyond** to defeat a three-term senator who has corporate PACs on his side.
>
> We need all of our team members to step up in new ways as we get closer and closer to November 3rd. **[Can we count on you to join* our donor team?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e90/7f51f7bc/40dc7829/4ef7af93/3267165663/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.2nd__1848__&amount=10")**
>
> We have an amazing chance to win Texas in less than three months, but to do it we'll need all hands on deck. On November 4th, we're all going to wake up either to the news that Sen. Cornyn will continue to stand in the way of progress -- or that Texas will have a senator ready to fight for the people. **[Help me make sure it's the latter.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e90/7f51f7bc/40dc7829/4ef7af93/3267165663/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.2nd__1848__&amount=10")**
> Thanks a million,
> MJ
>
>
>
> *If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update.
>
> [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e90/7f51f7bc/40dc7829/4ef7af93/3267165663/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.2nd__1848__&amount=10")
> ---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e90/7f51f7bc/40dc7829/4ef7af91/3267165663/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1848&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e90/7f51f7bc/40dc7829/4ef7af97/3267165663/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e90/7f51f7bc/40dc7829/4ef7af95/3267165663/VEsP/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").
---

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Hello --
I really need to explain what's happening in our race, and Senator Rosen said I could reach out to you because we need your help more than ever before. Here it goes:
A new poll just came out showing a close, single-digit race against Cory Gardner -- the tightest margin we've seen since Republican groups unleashed a devastating $9 million attack campaign against me.
We cannot risk the Democrats' best chance to take back the Senate because we got outspent or outworked by right-wing organizations bankrolled by Mitch McConnell.
Gardner's campaign has double the cash-on-hand than ours, and I'm sure the Koch network is gearing up for another round of nasty attacks designed to sink this race further. We need your help now to make sure we're ready for them:
**[If you can afford to give, please split a contribution to my campaign and Jacky Rosen of $5 or more. Any amount makes a huge difference in helping our team fight back against these attacks.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9600/4fbb2af3/21284bec/5e807209/1899913716/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItaGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMDgwM2kiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-hickenlooper?refcode=em200803i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
We are 92 days away from this election. I can't believe it myself. But I am telling you that we are the best shot Democrats have to flip a Senate seat, and we can't give that up.
That's why your donation is so important, and why I am personally counting on you to pitch in what you can today.
Thanks for all you do.
John Hickenlooper

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9600/4fbb2af3/21284bec/5e807209/1899913716/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItaGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMDgwM2kiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-hickenlooper?refcode=em200803i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9600/4fbb2af3/21284bec/5e807216/1899913716/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible.

Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126

[](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb78fa/4bd7760e/51793a7b/77a8f8e8/2805374183/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/obamabirthday/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday&source=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday&refcode=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday")
President Obama led our country for eight years with dignity, he championed our values, worked tirelessly to ensure that the future will be brighter for future generations, and science was respected and relied upon in decision-making.

**Everything he spent his life working toward is in jeopardy -- So Barack Obama is taking center stage again and giving this election his all.**

Just yesterday, he endorsed nearly a dozen of our Democratic scientists, we can't thank him enough!

The least we can do is wish him a happy birthday spent with loved ones: [Will you join us in wishing Barack Obama the most joyous of birthdays by signing here?](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb78fa/4bd7760e/51793a7b/77a8f8f7/2805374183/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/obamabirthday/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Will+you+join+us+in+wishing+Barack+Obama&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday&source=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday&refcode=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday")

[](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb78fa/4bd7760e/51793a7b/77a8f8f6/2805374183/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/obamabirthday/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday&source=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday&refcode=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday")
We owe a great deal of gratitude to the service Barack Obama has made -- and continues to make -- to our nation.

314 Action

---

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb78fa/4bd7760e/51793a7b/77a8f8f4/2805374183/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday&source=314_EM_PT_200804_6MC-6M5xOP_none_STD_1_Obamabday")** to make a donation.

To get text message updates from 314 Action text 314 to 31498.

[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=6b2b536b276e48b29413f60bdf6a36df&_e=xKvOAoqgVIkLhYpP-KkLI4nSQ5HHsiCkCB52jqqiQswKvMwq9OPHOCS87WyC7V0W6lkmPKvU5ArUXLHNk1RcQUevTiJW_ierDmLtX6MmN4k_h55axv17Rb88VxXHFsU76EWhuT6oT6MbKNFSVQMGy_5DIcK2EYfcEN9pay8En0e9dKaiWLWUxJg70bBQk4pr-oCnvXfDMg1yhMXJu2IIfBmG1caerB4xR2rjW1qaFCnZMC8vWEuZ18etkxYlxybMDRlBb_-m1RMoReRNIdXWvw%3D%3D) I hope you get a chance to read my latest article in the Federalist, "[If Conservatives Don’t Defend The American Idea, The Left Will Cancel It.](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=6b2b536b276e48b29413f60bdf6a36df&_e=xKvOAoqgVIkLhYpP-KkLI_cPtOZUpKWsKuhF91JhTco-3fnHYkSnSYQhs7llRDA8eaD8cxndWUjjZCaDfvI-z6lHaE7R_FUnMHUiub1l4hfH-Ya6-P2FaxXPMicaqfG5TkHscfhiCpDwwybeCwn0_nhSeYZq7dLa4da5GT0clWGFQ2CxYFqUOAUsrD0kUcFxeouF3CxatMOFLrEFfaU-6LTSIBJMiSxErp3dFje-lPaYVUTXgRi_Id9OL0Jog9YgP3p1xgpm0Dsjak339fOVUUFU1dDuuOi6_dyeUPgi5L4IjUQGrboWCXJTzBVzNpN53DKJglpsiqqiv1jXxNaVMp84hZ6_3Pm1McIJxKsIOGy8aEwYaKjGWuSuJw61ZpQ8)" This disagreement is about more than statues or textbooks; leftists are transforming the political debate from persuasion to condemnation. Whereas previous protesters such as Martin Luther King Jr. appealed to America’s conscience to correct injustices, today’s left rejects America’s conscience as hopelessly corrupt and is thus more interested in delegitimizing and remaking the nation. name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Single digit poll in Colorado
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
**It 's hard to see how we'd win the Senate majority without winning Colorado.**
That's why it's so important that we help John Hickenlooper flip this pivotal seat.
But right now, a new poll shows this race is in single digits -- the tightest margin yet since Republican groups launched a $9 million dollar attack campaign against John in Colorado.
**[We need to help John fight back and win this race. Rush in your $5 donation now.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200803-hickenlooper?refcode=em200803i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Colorado is one of Democrats' best chances to flip a red seat blue in this election and build a Democratic Senate majority -- and we can't afford to fall behind because we were outspent by Mitch McConnell and Republican groups determined to hold on to their GOP seat in Colorado.
I'm supporting John Hickenlooper through my Sprint to 2020 program because we simply can't miss this prime opportunity -- and I know that he has what it takes to not only win this race, but to be an advocate for his state and for our nation as Colorado's next Democratic U.S. Senator.
**[Pitch in $5 to stand with John Hickenlooper in Colorado and flip the Senate in 2020.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200803-hickenlooper?refcode=em200803i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200803-hickenlooper?refcode=em200803i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Bill Olson
subject: Don't let the skinny-armed Antifa kids win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSevJrJy4F6OuRU&b=qEIrxKiLnzgnVbjU5XRKyw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to restore sanity to Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSevJrJy4F6OuRU&b=qEIrxKiLnzgnVbjU5XRKyw

I just wish someone would restore sanity to America! These vicious rioters in Portland, Chicago, Seattle and other liberal cities are not just causing havoc.

They are trying to take away your very freedoms, our American freedoms, and up until now.... they are succeeding.

Remember how the Fascistic the "Anti-Fascist", or Antifa, terrorist movement became? They refuse to allow free speech or debate, and are intimidating Americans from speaking their mind:

Self-censorship is on the rise according to a new Cato Institute survey that reports nearly two-thirds of Americans are afraid to share their political views.

A new CATO Institute/YouGov national survey found 62% of Americans say the political climate today prevents them from saying what they believe. This is up several points from 2017 when 58% of Americans said they were afraid to share their political beliefs.

“31% of liberals, 30% of moderates and 34% of conservatives are worried their political views could get them fired or harm their career trajectory,” the CATO survey stated.

The time has come to stop the Left's "Cancel Culture", and restore the First Amendment so Americans can be Americans again!

A recent poll conducted by Politico found that a plurality of Americans believe cancel culture has gone too far. (RELATED: Poll: Large Plurality of Americans Say Cancel Culture Has Gone Too Far)

“There have been shifts across the board, where more people among all political groups feel they are walking on eggshells,” the CATO survey found, adding, “majorities of Democrats (52%), independents (59%) and Republicans (77%) who all agree they have political opinions they are afraid to share.”

“Strong liberals stand out, however, as the only political group who feel they can express themselves. Nearly 6 in 10 (58%) of staunch liberals feel they can say what they believe,” the CATO survey found.

This problem isn't limited to Portland or Seattle. They won't just attack combatants- they have attacked the elderly and innocent and anyone they just didn't like the look of!

Unless we stop these nutty Stalinist bigots now, this will be the future of every American city.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSevJrJy4F6OuRU&b=qEIrxKiLnzgnVbjU5XRKyw

Stalinist thugs terrorizing normal Americans. Where does it end?

This Maoist dystopia is Seattle, today; and it will be America, tomorrow- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSevJrJy4F6OuRU&b=qEIrxKiLnzgnVbjU5XRKyw

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSevJrJy4F6OuRU&b=qEIrxKiLnzgnVbjU5XRKyw

Thank God President Trump is sending Federal Law Enforcement into these crazy liberal cities to put down these Antifa terrorists. There must be law and order!

This garbage isn't legal, it isn't Constitutional, and is hard-line Communism- this isn't the America ANY of us know! We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hSevJrJy4F6OuRU&b=qEIrxKiLnzgnVbjU5XRKyw
?

I'm a soldier- not a slick politician. But I remember that I have taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have big PAC money, which is why I need your help!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: A leader with moral integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I'm writing to you today about Reverend Raphael Warnock
| | |
---
Friend,

We're at an inflection point in our nation's history - and what we choose to do in this moment will define us. We can let the Republican Party continue to sow division and attack the very character of our democracy. Or, we can turn the page and usher in a new era of leadership, rooted in morality, unity and service.

**I 'm proud to endorse my friend Reverend Raphael Warnock, and I'm going to do everything I can to make sure we elect bold candidates like Reverend Warnock who will deliver real change.**

He is a civil rights champion who's running for Senate to flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to Washington. As the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., Reverend Warnock believes his impact doesn't stop at the church door - it's where it begins. He's poised to make history as Georgia's first-ever Black senator, but he needs our help to win.

****With _The Washington Post_ reporting that a win in Georgia is _key_ to taking back the Senate for Democrats, Mitch McConnell and Washington Republicans are pulling out all the stops to keep this battleground state red. So today, I'm humbly asking for your help in fighting back: [Will you give $5 or more now to help Reverend Warnock raise $25,000 by midnight to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-surrogate?refcode=jtk404-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-surrogate?refcode=jtk404-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [Donate $25](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-surrogate?refcode=jtk404-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-surrogate?refcode=jtk404-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-surrogate?refcode=jtk404-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
When I ran for president, I was struck by the common thread in the concerns of voters everywhere. From Atlanta, Georgia, to Des Moines, Iowa, the Americans I talked to across the country were hungry for change - more importantly, hungry for a kind of moral integrity that's lacking in our government right now.
It's time to throw away the same old playbook with the same old thinking and elect a strong Democratic leader like Reverend Warnock who's committed to a bold vision for the next generation. He's a lifelong advocate for voting rights, affordable health care and the dignity of working people - and he's ready to bring these critical fights for justice to the Senate.
**Here's the thing, friend: Right now, Reverend Warnock and his extremist GOP opponent are running neck and neck - and if we don't help him pull ahead now, we will miss the chance to win this race and lose our chance to take back the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell.**
[**The campaign's next fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, and right now, they're falling short of their goal. So please, will you make a contribution of $5 or more now to win in Georgia, take back the Senate for Democrats and finally restore moral leadership to Washington?**](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-surrogate?refcode=jtk404-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

If we want to save America, we've got to bring an end to Mitch McConnell's roadblocks to progress. Thanks for chipping in to help us get it done.
Thank you,

Pete Buttigieg
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e2e1/288179be/9632ea9/348e11c0/2916629258/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031
---

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: We’ve never delayed an election before.
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTR3aRADOqEiBEhKCvCwHRt5nRgA9X6lpPE9u2HLBUlF9zQlN0rlKf9wqYDwcQGuFWQ0wsc96uhOBU7WC84miNbdL9x5PhArXCeEB8yNQ4I9EQN-UFcJLQz3mf1Jmr9vlkHEqfJjcnToDxI9h5MYQt1DDZRejLMNvHv_YYa04D4UQ/341/gd8vZUbvTdGJi8w7WZk8Ow/h0/mnzQdUVYT8S1Y0VyqKqnRSGoI8ER2Gyp19eHWw7er9k) Team —

Concerns that Trump may delegitimize — or outright reject — the results of the November election have grown over the course of the year.

Last week, **those concerns earned their wings**.

To those who saw it coming, Trump’s insistence that the election will be so riddled in fraud that we ought to delay it altogether came as no surprise.

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0n5Qb5xjaWQ-ETscSkvkipoQ6rgchbOKq9TS-mBWTCzAorJK8Qj9CEuZGGXU8aQ9puAXhg1HbftDh0Kl9nzy6sttQ-DA2q6o_7yoa1DMHCokmWu3JJZq7_MkD7bCVu1-xiQqQAmykrfqiJSP0TZOCW8-Emy7Vj15VGNYUwMqaV_qrrKpIGRWyPOxdMNM16S0IKjzFNEJOpGfag_vy_f19YZWXUwreSCQOTA7txByDxptJp51FRVk4Lt4WK-yR1MoF06us0rr0dXY6VmpkAg_wCA/341/gd8vZUbvTdGJi8w7WZk8Ow/h1/A2mSODvgTnnPvySctaY0fYDRHA2Xkd-YzRfYr1aLPGE) He began laying the groundwork for this months ago. But it was the appointment of one of his own donors, Louis DeJoy, **as head of the U.S. Postal Service, that marked the beginnings of a far more coordinated attack on our democracy**.

Since DeJoy took the office, the Trump donor has been gutting USPS funding in a manner that looks an awful lot like voter suppression: **slashing employee hours** during high volume delivery windows, **deauthorizing “late trips”** and “extra trips,” cutting **the use of overtime to deliver packages on time** — all according to a leaked department memo.

These changes are the inevitable second phase of Trump’s tireless campaign to misinform the American people, sow doubt into the results of the November election — or even alter those results altogether.

It’s voter suppression happening in real time, and American voters need to be aware of it. Unless we take action, Trump could very well succeed in his attempts to erode vote-by-mail. That’s why we're lifting the voices of postal workers who are fighting his efforts on the ground.

**[Amidst the political crossfire are America’s postal workers, and they’re sharing stories about their commitment to keeping the mail delivery system intact.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmayLG1kOLDo2I29L-q3EuB3FOlbk2d9M-T-ZcLEek7lxgNguGn6jl-Y7QpmagwMA8zEatWhT-P63SdKNGhtK6LG1IYD-3vm93OGPsjmWPo-ZdAfpDeMLSc4xj66qEqov3qhqWOLCNIXoXujzkuNuDe3CHtVue4AIPE_xjNgov4F_6s6xtjyYrPUxAwtqsnF1rKTB57sIvy_ECTyh3UWLopIDylIK9CbwAyxTECVj7xo6px2Y2AjptAHDgFuGlHrAShurDqvmpZIcrNu6qN5c7YQ/341/gd8vZUbvTdGJi8w7WZk8Ow/h2/8FC6ozQ2krDYFHcQ4If-Zz6NGX-O14mXeWyaXtjVFF4)**

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmayLG1kOLDo2I29L-q3EuB-8fbBL3IXe7RFFsef1j5jm7daNLexvcUIa2A43yfsirBcXPFYOtqZz_p006S3uN6rSoacXm3sWOcRgQHHExYVFDlED0MCUdLjqJMWjLFo5K881fP2Tx5i-CI07s2T2NkewkDWyE5WvXpsl5QWdL511EhF8-TfwwOkq6BrqDe9P6wy7ENQ1KsJinW8cWGFJWOzHbV4gfrafDKLMEu5icsCGamFH0gF3rNUh1haCUHvWgd3Tlcnp4Ovc5-3ygxbSElA/341/gd8vZUbvTdGJi8w7WZk8Ow/h3/BtGdLssirBBGvtKN7FE5j0Oa1qPUxwccWPUDCL63OVc) **[Trump is going beyond disinfo to tangible election interference. Remember — we’re fighting a digital war. Share this content with your followers and you’ll spread truth further than far-right fiction.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmayLG1kOLDo2I29L-q3EuB8yIByLdyCsIYUJGa0BYIBciz5I34FmcUfw4E46J_Hc3p5Vfk7W7g0E7bcg9zJjLjwD4LiIeyGt_I4elJt5hqhLKkFaxQTA3Wni_T5Cm9c3sbUKWSZKAPb8pcJ7pb5CCWkKSRZg_dOJVhtXT1FlvLmT6u5UQATg5VnvCyqj7nPzof4jYIrmI5ACSIyEzFG1MD-l3Ub-pBFYrp4yQob40U4IF1ZsY3QzsriiG3tvFZGUGzJOB_y7irb4RLswdYWL1oQ/341/gd8vZUbvTdGJi8w7WZk8Ow/h4/vDzp3jrDoQgYuGIXoQaNvrat88_q-w6_1vjWtXb5du8)**

The Defeat Disinfo Team

P.S. Fighting against Trump’s disinformation campaigns costs money. We know times are tough right now, but, if you can, [**chip in $5 to make sure Trump is a one-term president and competent leaders can start repairing the mess that he’s made.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkbb_yVnXQwxZv55zlmWtK2W-Q9lV6pE9zu_0xcgMR51Vqd9JmJ2zExPYaEZvdn0M9W4sUieiXolpaCuWDM5tFCeojUmb2k-LenWG7w0YrEmNF1ZOoCsvgKLuJCZhLHmwRxCwVlK3SBYFRvY3StC-R8UtVaIcnQJ_WQ0c0rY8aUmqoqiaP1haeww9U2WDp6dfUX2LKmrHtVRLa9O6EPrgH_BRKggq9yir4GNYNvsx2q1jfuSsYxAvkwOrf6YZ3UdeYdl9iktKiYuBvPr7ZUL61fUeLh3HDvRqzvaSLUxsdcJs25Q2GWQWkpVoZXoa_Oxn2XhCFFk-cAsQa_Nxb4Mdtzk/341/gd8vZUbvTdGJi8w7WZk8Ow/h5/-oXrKjZ_BCunEwXlfVfXhA5kuYb6lFjqjbV5zv_EqlY)

_If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies[here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr1g46P94BplcmiCKSvAkrwSMykqdJtrp0T0yjv2Pr_jBHs97bhKObJB5TAQa4fBfrXe1WYgwIpGQ7M6icIHsh_g4hxWGKR2TOpy28TgkxKvH34_iJnAKTuBWs9QQPxStDflEPvKYZYt8S9a0UWOuDlPjXviGMIqxsAP6QAM0v6kE8Cn-aFWbGrAFMRXts4Du-CRLwcUi5WAWDa1z_3tqYYWpWyHowRUvHNeMdv0LRRJNIuJUhxiyuCJje_OerylT-8/341/gd8vZUbvTdGJi8w7WZk8Ow/h6/kjfIds8UxSYTeVFrbYlEkHFFlbVuAg8AeLvX2idwxTM)._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: Sean Feucht Conversation Link
body:
Watch this 15 minute edited conversation with Sean Feucht. | | | |
---
| **Watch the Conversation with Sean**
---
| | |
---
| **Hi Friends! Watch this edited 15 minute conversation with Sean Feucht - Bethel Music worship leader, former candidate for US Congress, and founder of Hold The Line. I talked with Sean about why it is so important for Christians, people of faith, those who love freedom, and any American, to vote & engage with politics, and why it is so important right now.

Sean is a tremendous man of God, husband, and father who lives to serve others with everything he has. He is bold, and was even tweeted about by Donald Trump Jr. because he was improperly censored by Instagram for posts about people worshipping God.

Watch the interview and email me with any of your thoughts.

[Click this link to watch](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=4ef7f0e8b3&e=b78e7c4d40)**

**Also, I had the privilege of supporting candidates for US Congress, Jeanne Ives and Jim Oberweis, at a small private event recently. I am rooting for them and am happy to volunteer for their campaigns this season. (See the pictures below.)

#BeBold
-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=45b0ae8151&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=997dc7be9e&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

clean_body: Watch this 15 minute edited conversation with Sean Feucht. | | | | | Watch the Conversation with Sean | | | | Hi Friends! Watch this edited 15 minute conversation with Sean Feucht - Bethel Music worship leader, former candidate for US Congress, and founder of Hold The Line. I talked with Sean about why it is so important for Christians, people of faith, those who love freedom, and any American, to vote & engage with politics, and why it is so important right now. Sean is a tremendous man of God, husband, and father who lives to serve others with everything he has. He is bold, and was even tweeted about by Donald Trump Jr. because he was improperly censored by Instagram for posts about people worshipping God. Watch the interview and email me with any of your thoughts. Also, I had the privilege of supporting candidates for US Congress, Jeanne Ives and Jim Oberweis, at a small private event recently. I am rooting for them and am happy to volunteer for their campaigns this season. (See the pictures below.) #BeBold -Jerry Evans Please check out my to learn more about me and for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey. | "Conversation Link" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 - Jerry Evans for Illinois, All rights reserved. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: More than a job
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Thousands of Rhode Islanders and millions of Americans are out of work. They want to work hard, and it's on us to give them that opportunity. It's about more than a new job - it's about providing the education, skills and support for a new career. That approach is what brought us back from recession over the past five years, and it's more important now than ever. That's why we're dedicating $45 million in federal stimulus funds to train and support up to 7,000 Rhode Islanders for good jobs in the new economy through the [Back to Work RI program](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j3hrbCvYdDrv_4w6KcGlMX66-xVh7hqdM2GjDV6tf7Eczc7hi13vZaUG3dAz6hXRKSp9J51F5prZBORD5f4QZYi13Himh6UnOgqPA00eEa5FjzIZ4l4SWKNHUCmGmKjkXeVj0idMQvHsZPa0nBAlbcQI7zyZ6Mjz&c=N8uLEcHGddyakUMnEl2DfnzN-I5jwCqNIZYCsf2tg_nu6fDLQAHNmw==&ch=xJf-LCu_KmrXXW_5blOPAoEhcmWmW-TdQIgaBP1jO4llEfRI92WhYQ==). We're supercharging the approach to job training program that has worked over the past few years and making it available to thousands of people whose jobs have been impacted by COVID-19. It's about targeted training programs with the promise of a job at the finish line, and supports along the way to help you see it through. Today, I want you to hear from graduates of Rhode Island's job training programs about how this unified approach to job training changed their lives.
---
| "I was doing the fast track program at CCRI through the Real Jobs Rhode Island, and I think it's a great program because I have a new job, a consistent job, with benefits and health insurance, and I'm pretty happy working here. It's not a big company, but I think it's a big family and I'm grateful for that."
Ingridt D., Cranston
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j3hrbCvYdDrv_4w6KcGlMX66-xVh7hqdM2GjDV6tf7Eczc7hi13vZcrHUP4C0-KQglFajneV9KLBsNCEMQldnHGWtRJeu74XzfA0-mCMsYt4S7vX2SCU_R1uO1fp4gJq9vksqUK-UsvlVh6-GPiytg==&c=N8uLEcHGddyakUMnEl2DfnzN-I5jwCqNIZYCsf2tg_nu6fDLQAHNmw==&ch=xJf-LCu_KmrXXW_5blOPAoEhcmWmW-TdQIgaBP1jO4llEfRI92WhYQ==)
---
| "I applied because there was training included and we went over customer service, software hardware requirements, effective communication, active listening, emotional intelligence, and it is still helping me at the job today. And now I am just super grateful."
Korali K., Riverside
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j3hrbCvYdDrv_4w6KcGlMX66-xVh7hqdM2GjDV6tf7Eczc7hi13vZcrHUP4C0-KQ-qxYKRJou2451zyUDFT5x0HEUVrkh7yDv2OwrBqRNNibBypyNTHEOEqTpvSEDIdgU8QShHNxkHbY8j3mxyzyrw==&c=N8uLEcHGddyakUMnEl2DfnzN-I5jwCqNIZYCsf2tg_nu6fDLQAHNmw==&ch=xJf-LCu_KmrXXW_5blOPAoEhcmWmW-TdQIgaBP1jO4llEfRI92WhYQ==)
---
| "It was something that changed my life. Thanks to that, I have a wonderful job at Aquidneck Custom. We're building our second 72' custom catamaran, and I only want to say thank you to RIMTA, thank you to the state, thank you to Aquidneck for giving me this opportunity."
Miggel O., Bristol

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, Thousands of Rhode Islanders and millions of Americans are out of work. They want to work hard, and it's on us to give them that opportunity. It's about more than a new job - it's about providing the education, skills and support for a new career. That approach is what brought us back from recession over the past five years, and it's more important now than ever. That's why we're dedicating $45 million in federal stimulus funds to train and support up to 7,000 Rhode Islanders for good jobs in the new economy through the ==. We're supercharging the approach to job training program that has worked over the past few years and making it available to thousands of people whose jobs have been impacted by COVID-19. It's about targeted training programs with the promise of a job at the finish line, and supports along the way to help you see it through. Today, I want you to hear from graduates of Rhode Island's job training programs about how this unified approach to job training changed their lives. | "I was doing the fast track program at CCRI through the Real Jobs Rhode Island, and I think it's a great program because I have a new job, a consistent job, with benefits and health insurance, and I'm pretty happy working here. It's not a big company, but I think it's a big family and I'm grateful for that." Ingridt D., Cranston | == | "I applied because there was training included and we went over customer service, software hardware requirements, effective communication, active listening, emotional intelligence, and it is still helping me at the job today. And now I am just super grateful." Korali K., Riverside | == | "It was something that changed my life. Thanks to that, I have a wonderful job at Aquidneck Custom. We're building our second 72' custom catamaran, and I only want to say thank you to RIMTA, thank you to the state, thank you to Aquidneck for giving me this opportunity." Miggel O., Bristol | == | "The Apprenticeship Program has opened up a lot of doors for me to just continue to grow in the landscape industry. I've been able to continue working through the pandemic and all the other chaos that has been going on in the world, so I feel very blessed to be doing what we are doing." Sam S., Newport | == | We know that our job training programs work, and that they've made an enormous difference in the lives of Rhode Islanders. Now is the time to double down on that approach and make sure that our friends, families, and neighbors can get the training and skills for good jobs in growing industries. We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: Barack Obama
subject: Asking you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We have to harness the power of this historic moment. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.04_B2_bho-volunteer_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.04_B2_bho-volunteer_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full")
---
Peter --

Today is my birthday, and I point that out only because I've been reflecting on what the past year has meant for me, my family, and our country.

And while this birthday is certainly like no other, one thing is clear: this year has already been transformative for the country, and we have to harness the power of this historic moment.

That's why I'm committed to doing everything I can over these next three months to make sure we elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot, and why I'm asking you to do the same. Because Peter, whatever we've done already is not enough. We have to do more.

[**So, here 's what I'm asking you to do: will you commit right now to volunteering for Joe Biden in the final 91 days of this campaign? I can't think of a better way to celebrate my birthday than knowing thousands of Democrats are coming together to do whatever it takes to win in November.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba58/1cd0ac28/17b4ef3e4/357d68bd/3827148847/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-email-nd?source=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.04_B2_bho-volunteer_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.04_B2_bho-volunteer_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full")
[COMMIT TO VOLUNTEER >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba58/1cd0ac28/17b4ef3e4/357d68bc/3827148847/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-email-nd?source=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.04_B2_bho-volunteer_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.04_B2_bho-volunteer_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full")
---
Peter, I got my start in public service as a community organizer. And during every one of my campaigns, I saw the power of grassroots volunteers to change the world.

Without grassroots supporters like you, I wouldn't have been elected President, and Joe Biden wouldn't have been elected Vice President. I know that to be true, and so does Joe.

So Peter, if you're as fired up as I am to make sure we elect Joe Biden in November, put a real leader in the White House, and get back to the government actually working for the people -- will you commit to volunteering today?

**Joe and I are counting on growing this campaign 's volunteer operation like never before, and we can't do that without you. Will you join me, and thousands of other Democrats, by committing to volunteer to help elect Joe Biden and great leaders across the country today?**
[COMMIT TO VOLUNTEER >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba58/1cd0ac28/17b4ef3e4/357d68bc/3827148847/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-email-nd?source=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.04_B2_bho-volunteer_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.04_B2_bho-volunteer_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full")

Barack Obama

\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘From Yellowstone to Yosemite, National Parks to Get Long-Awaited Overhaul’
body:
President Trump signed the Great American Outdoors Act this morning—a historic, bipartisan law that... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b238bc11d9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 4, 2020
---
| | |
# **‘From Yellowstone to Yosemite, National Parks to Get Long-Awaited Overhaul’**

**President Trump signed** the Great American Outdoors Act this morning—a historic, bipartisan law that marks the largest-ever investment into America’s national parks and public lands. It will also create more than 100,000 infrastructure-related jobs.

🎬 [**President Trump: We are preserving America’s natural heritage**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d935ec15d0&e=3ee4985eea)

**Americans who have visited** our national parks during the Coronavirus pandemic have found them in need of investment. Estimates place the national deferred maintenance backlog across all public lands at approximately $20 billion.

**The President’s action** today will bring this much-needed maintenance to our public lands, many of which play an important role in our economy. Last year, over 327 million people visited America’s majestic national parks. All told, America’s outdoor recreation economy accounted for more than 2 percent of our GDP—and 5.2 million jobs—in 2017.

**The Great American Outdoors Act** won the support of more than 850 conservation groups, along with 43 sportsmen and sportswomen groups. It is the single greatest American conservation achievement since the presidency of Theodore Roosevelt.

**📖**[** _The Wall Street Journal_****: National Parks Get Long-Awaited Overhaul**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b439bc38d&e=3ee4985eea)

**To preserve our parks** , the law will provide $900 million each year in permanent funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund, and will allocate $9.5 billion over 5 years to restore facilities and infrastructure in our national parks and public lands.

**“Last night** , I added it up: 5 presidents, 9 secretaries of the interior, and 10 secretaries of agriculture have worked on legislation to accomplish fully funding the Land and Water Conservation Fund, or enhancing our nation’s parks by addressing in the backlog,” Interior Secretary David Bernhardt said at the White House today.

**“Only one president** has gotten that done.”

🎬 [**WATCH: “Conserving the grandeur and splendor of God’s creation.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3886a24ed5&e=3ee4985eea)

**LEARN MORE:**[**Restoring the majesty of America’s public lands**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01f7e91307&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Press Secretary: ‘President Trump is working hard to save your healthcare’**

**President Trump** signed an executive order last night expanding access to telehealth services for millions of Americans—especially those living in rural communities.

**“The Trump Administration** has cut red tape allowing telehealth services for seniors and for other Americans,” Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany said at today’s briefing. “Thirty-five percent of Medicare beneficiaries took advantage of the President’s reform.”

🎬 [**President Trump: “I’m taking action to ensure telehealth is here to stay”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5773581352&e=3ee4985eea)

**Last night’s executive order** also calls for more investments into Rural America’s communications infrastructure to better support telehealth. As a result, more Americans would have access to the kind of affordable, personalized care that puts the patient in control rather than the federal government.

**“Democrats seek to deny** Americans their healthcare freedom, but President Trump is working hard to save your healthcare,” McEnany said.

**These telehealth expansions** build on the work the Trump Administration has done during the pandemic to more than double the number of allowable telehealth services.

**“We worked with the leaders** of major health insurance companies to ensure coverage for the telehealth visits related to Coronavirus. We cut red tape to allow many services to be conducted by phone, rather than video, which is much simpler, providing a much easier option for many seniors in particular,” President Trump said.

**“We allocated nearly** $165 million through the CARES Act to support nearly 1,800 small rural hospitals who have done an incredible job, as well as $11.5 million to expand technical assistance for rural and underserved areas.”

[**WATCH: More than 135 new services available through telehealth**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1f85ae82e3&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **Secretary Sonny Perdue** : [**Rural America needs telehealth**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=047d06d136&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump holds the signed Great American Outdoors Act** | August 4, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13b03ec6da&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=074c6c469b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=354e14a4fc)

clean_body: President Trump signed the Great American Outdoors Act this morning—a historic, bipartisan law that... | | | | | The White House • August 4, 2020 | | | ‘From Yellowstone to Yosemite, National Parks to Get Long-Awaited Overhaul’ President Trump signed the Great American Outdoors Act this morning—a historic, bipartisan law that marks the largest-ever investment into America’s national parks and public lands. It will also create more than 100,000 infrastructure-related jobs. 🎬 Americans who have visited our national parks during the Coronavirus pandemic have found them in need of investment. Estimates place the national deferred maintenance backlog across all public lands at approximately $20 billion. The President’s action today will bring this much-needed maintenance to our public lands, many of which play an important role in our economy. Last year, over 327 million people visited America’s majestic national parks. All told, America’s outdoor recreation economy accounted for more than 2 percent of our GDP—and 5.2 million jobs—in 2017. The Great American Outdoors Act won the support of more than 850 conservation groups, along with 43 sportsmen and sportswomen groups. It is the single greatest American conservation achievement since the presidency of Theodore Roosevelt. 📖 To preserve our parks , the law will provide $900 million each year in permanent funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund, and will allocate $9.5 billion over 5 years to restore facilities and infrastructure in our national parks and public lands. “Last night , I added it up: 5 presidents, 9 secretaries of the interior, and 10 secretaries of agriculture have worked on legislation to accomplish fully funding the Land and Water Conservation Fund, or enhancing our nation’s parks by addressing in the backlog,” Interior Secretary David Bernhardt said at the White House today. “Only one president has gotten that done.” 🎬 LEARN MORE: | | Press Secretary: ‘President Trump is working hard to save your healthcare’ President Trump signed an executive order last night expanding access to telehealth services for millions of Americans—especially those living in rural communities. “The Trump Administration has cut red tape allowing telehealth services for seniors and for other Americans,” Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany said at today’s briefing. “Thirty-five percent of Medicare beneficiaries took advantage of the President’s reform.” 🎬 Last night’s executive order also calls for more investments into Rural America’s communications infrastructure to better support telehealth. As a result, more Americans would have access to the kind of affordable, personalized care that puts the patient in control rather than the federal government. “Democrats seek to deny Americans their healthcare freedom, but President Trump is working hard to save your healthcare,” McEnany said. These telehealth expansions build on the work the Trump Administration has done during the pandemic to more than double the number of allowable telehealth services. “We worked with the leaders of major health insurance companies to ensure coverage for the telehealth visits related to Coronavirus. We cut red tape to allow many services to be conducted by phone, rather than video, which is much simpler, providing a much easier option for many seniors in particular,” President Trump said. “We allocated nearly $165 million through the CARES Act to support nearly 1,800 small rural hospitals who have done an incredible job, as well as $11.5 million to expand technical assistance for rural and underserved areas.” 🎬 Secretary Sonny Perdue : | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump holds the signed Great American Outdoors Act | August 4, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations=20PAC?=
subject: Welcome Alaska Director, Donnie Johnson!
body:
We're so excited to have Donnie Johnson on our team! We need you this Wednesday to volunteer and help us flip Alaska! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=5f53a8d97f&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
## **WELCOME ALASKA DIRECTOR, DONNIE JOHNSON!**
---
|
### **Future Generations is proud to have Donnie join us and launch some of the most ambitous plans for Alaska!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=bb03e6863b&e=66979298f9)
---
| Hello! I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to take a moment and introduce myself. My name is Donnie Johnson and I am the new Director for Future Generations PAC in Alaska! I’m joining Future Generations with over fourteen years of experience working with labor unions, political campaigns, and as a lobbyist for alternative energy legislation. Most recently I spent six months working as the Deputy National “Get Out the Vote” Director for Tom Steyer's presidential campaign. Previously I spent five years working for the National Education Association and its state affiliates. I started my political career working for President Barack Obama's historic 08' campaign as an organizer in Ohio, served as the Deputy State Field Director for the Ohio Democratic Party, and as Field Director for Senator Sherrod Brown's reelection campaign in 2012. Fast forward to today and I am thrilled to join Future Generations in their support of climate champion, Al Gross for United States Senate. Together we've built a coalition of grassroots organizations, working with key allies on mobilizing young voters and Native Alaskans to take action through data driven and digital organizing efforts. The Alaska Primaries is just 15 days away and we have a long list of action events planned with a number of allies who understand how important this 2020 election cycle is. **[First on this list is Flip the West and our event this Wednesday](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=708fa0a703&e=66979298f9)! **Now we need your help to ensure Al is successful on August 18th and we must continue building on that momentum through the General Election. **[Are you ready to send Republican Dan Sullivan packing?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d9b0657b68&e=66979298f9)**
---
| [VOLUNTEER TO FLIP ALASKA](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1f767ecd4c&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER TO FLIP ALASKA")
---
|
---
|
# MEET DR. AL GROSS
---
| We are supporting Dr. Al Gross for U.S. Senate in Alaska and quickly have proven that this is one race you must keep your eye on!
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d47cacd3d8&e=66979298f9)
---
| **_We need all hands on deck! Election Day is Tuesday August 18th!_**
---
| We are asking you to join us this Wednesday at 5pm PDT for a phone bank with volunteers all over the country that understand the importance of the Alaska Senate race. You can sign up [**here**](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=e3771c5a32&e=66979298f9) or by clicking the button below.
---
| [VOLUNTEER TO FLIP ALASKA](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7649aeec66&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER TO FLIP ALASKA")
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, we must focus on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.**[ Will you invest today for seven generations into the future?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=51ae9d6061&e=66979298f9)**
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d3b2710aa7&e=66979298f9)
---
| Starting this Wednesday, August 5th, we will be hosting a phone banking party with Flip the West at 5:00pm PDT with volunteers from all over the nation! Once you sign up you will receive a Confirmation Email from Flip the West with links to Zoom and the script.

RSVP HERE: [https://www.mobilize.us/flipthewest/event/293448/](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=e821abf962&e=66979298f9)
#### What You'll Need
Chrome browser on your Mac or PC. Other choices such as Safari or Firefox, or your iPad, tablet or phone are not compatible with our automated dialing system. As you will be making calls from your computer, we suggest using ear buds with a microphone. In order to use Zoom, your computer needs to have a microphone with audio enabled. If your computer has a camera, enable it also. With your help we have a chance to do something special in Alaska please RSVP **[here](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=cc0663a104&e=66979298f9).**
---
| [TIME TO FLIP ALASKA!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=19c8815e6b&e=66979298f9 "TIME TO FLIP ALASKA!")
---
|
---
|
### _ALASKANS FOR AL_
---
| | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b9c6f119c3&e=66979298f9)
---
This is the most important race you haven't heard of. Dr. Al Gross was our first endorsement because we saw the excitement and hope he brought Alaskans who are ready for change. Our ground game in Alaska is strong and we are ready to deliver a win on August 18th! We set out to build a national coalition of activists, organizations, volunteers, and a top-notch team at Future Generations. I am proud to report that we are on track to doing just that! Donnie has been an incredible addition to team and has already launched programs in Alaska that are making noise nationwide. We have a few surprise allies and events coming up! Make sure you tell all your friends to sign up to volunteer or donate to help Al across the finish line.
Roza Calderon, _Executive Director_
[Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)
---
| [SPLIT A DONATION WITH FUTURE GENS & AL](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=fd7690f565&e=66979298f9 "SPLIT A DONATION WITH FUTURE GENS & AL")
---

---

| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=621bcd811d&e=66979298f9)

| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=578a85ff66&e=66979298f9)
---
|

| _Copyright © 2020 Future Generations PAC, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Future Generations PACPO Box 1861Olympia, WA 98507-2394
[Add us to your address book](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/vcard?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=f09fb212d9).

name: Barbara Bollier
subject: The general election starts now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas
body:
Together, we’re going to win this race in November -- and when I am your next U.S. Senator, I will work my heart out every day on behalf of your families, our state, and our Kansas values. |
---
| | We did it, team! Because of the unwavering commitment that grassroots supporters like you have shown so far during this campaign, I am proud to officially be your Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate. Together, we’re going to win this race in November -- and when I am your next U.S. Senator, I will work my heart out every day on behalf of your families, our state, and our Kansas values. [**I need your support as we kick off the general election and build a strong campaign to flip Kansas’ Senate seat. Can I count on you? Make a $5 contribution right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18548747/232033133/-851626?refcode=em200804pm-i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNjMmE1MS1jMGQ2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pn1_SvIulPU-rIeD41wthvbo63qKFyYjNk1fnoSY9F8=) Team, we just proved Kansans are ready for a voice of reason in the Senate. The Kansas GOP primary still hasn’t been called -- but we know no matter who our opponent is this fall, we’ll be up against a far-right candidate who will have Mitch McConnell’s full support. And regardless of whether Republicans nominate Kris Kobach, Roger Marshall or Bob Hamilton, the polls show that this race is competitive. I know that together, we can win in November. A Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC is already spending millions in Kansas -- and the GOP and corporate special interests are about to double down in the fight to keep this crucial seat red. [**Team, the general election starts now -- and I need you with me in the fight to flip Kansas’ Senate seat in November. Contribute $5 to my campaign now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18548748/232033134/-851626?refcode=em200804pm-i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNjMmE1MS1jMGQ2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pn1_SvIulPU-rIeD41wthvbo63qKFyYjNk1fnoSY9F8=) When I’m in the Senate, I will work as hard as I can to expand access to affordable healthcare. I will do everything in my power to ensure we’re taking urgent action on climate change, rooting out corruption and dysfunction in Washington, and fighting for good jobs and a strong economy. But if the Republicans keep this seat, we can expect more of the same divisive hyper-partisanship. I believe Kansans deserve better -- that’s why I need your support. [**We can flip this seat -- but with less than three months to go until Election Day, we don’t have any time to waste. Contribute $5 or whatever you can to join me in the fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18548749/232033135/-851626?refcode=em200804pm-i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNjMmE1MS1jMGQ2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pn1_SvIulPU-rIeD41wthvbo63qKFyYjNk1fnoSY9F8=) Thank you, Barbara **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18548750/232033136/-851626?refcode=em200804pm-i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNjMmE1MS1jMGQ2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pn1_SvIulPU-rIeD41wthvbo63qKFyYjNk1fnoSY9F8=)**
