name: =?utf-8?Q?Ellen_Foster_=28Jon_Ossoff=E2=80=99s_campaign_manager=29?=
subject: Fwd: 📣Jon wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
help guide our campaign strategy |
---
Friend,

I am meeting with Jon next week to go over our plans for the rest of the month and as we head into the campaign's homestretch.

**Jon wants to make sure we hear from his supporters -- but we haven't gotten your Summer Survey back yet, according to our records.**

**[Before I meet with Jon, will you take this short survey to share your input with us? name: Tom Cotton
subject: Democrats stealing the election?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
I want to make sure you know what the Democrats are doing to try to steal the 2020 election. Over the weekend, Democrats in Nevada passed a bill to have an all-mail election that will send ballots to every voter even if the voter didn't request a ballot.A rushed and half-baked change to an all-mail election would be a disaster. New York tried this for their June 23 primary and they're still counting the votes, 6 weeks later.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMTgzNDAS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM1Mjk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

I want to make sure you know what the Democrats are doing to try to steal the 2020 election. Over the weekend, Democrats in Nevada passed a bill to have an all-mail election that will send ballots to every voter **even if the voter didn 't request a ballot**.

Here's the problem, Peter. A rushed and half-baked change to an all-mail election would be a disaster. New York tried this for their June 23 primary and **they 're still counting the votes, 6 weeks later**.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMTgzNDAS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM1Mjk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

At this pace, New York won't finish counting ballots for the November election until July 2021! All-mail elections, when rushed and done in a partisan way, are rife with fraud. States often don't have accurate records of where voters live or which voters are still alive. And there's little that can be done to stop a corrupt election official from throwing out ballots mailed from a Republican neighborhood.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMTgzNDAS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM1Mjk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

But it gets worse. Democrats are also pushing **BALLOT HARVESTING** which is a corrupt practice backed by George Soros. Ballot harvesting is when political operatives collect thousands of ballots, hold them, then turn them in to election officials. Ballot harvesting is nothing more than a chance to steal elections--and it's already happened. In 2018, a congressional election was invalidated because of fraudulent ballot harvesting.

Why are Democrats pushing this? Because they're scared that President Trump is going to win re-election. That's why they need to change the rules, just like they want to abolish the electoral college, pack the Supreme Court, and make D.C. a state.

Peter, we need to fight back. And the only way to do so is to make sure Republicans **WIN OUTSIDE THE DEMOCRATIC MARGIN OF FRAUD.**

That's why I've got ads up exposing the Democrats for being soft on crime and for refusing to stand with our police. If we can make sure enough people vote against the liberal mob, we'll be sure to win.

Will you help me keep attacking the Democrats so we can win this election by a safe margin? Please, contribute to my emergency fund to help us beat Democratic voter fraud and win big.
_****_
[Donate $25](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMTgzNDAS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM1Mjk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
_****_
[Donate $50](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMTgzNDAS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM1Mjk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
_****_
[Donate $100](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMTgzNDAS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM1Mjk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
_****_
[Donate $250](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMTgzNDAS1&kn=20&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM1Mjk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

In service,
****
****
****
Tom Cotton **
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMTgzNDAS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDM1Mjk1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

subject: not backing down

body:

We just got word of some intel that I wanted to share with you -- and it changes everything. **A major Democrat super donor is threatening to dump $40k into the race in this GOP primary to try to purchase the seat for my opponent.** They know that Matt Mowers will be easy to beat if he makes it past the primary, so they want him to win. Granite Staters know a carpetbagger when they see one -- and that's Matt Mowers. Shipped in from New Jersey, he doesn't share our values -- and they hope you don't notice. body:
In Texas winning takes more.

|

| | Here's the thing about our goals, Peter: They're a baseline. And frankly, with a new poll showing that MJ is within _single digits_ of defeating Senator Cornyn, hitting the baseline just isn't enough.

This is your last opportunity to make a donation toward today's goal. **[Will you pitch in to help us raise another $4,560 and knock today's budget goal out of the park?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e92/7f51f7bc/40d3e96d/4ef79454/845649515/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.3nd__1842__&amount=10")**

Look -- it's not enough to sit back and say, "We hit that goal, so now we're all set to defeat Sen. Cornyn." He's a three-term senator who has _never lost an election_ , and it's going to take more than just going through the motions to defeat him.

**We know he 's vulnerable. We know that a third of Texas voters are undecided**, and that Sen. Cornyn only has a 29% approval rating -- but that doesn't mean we have this race in the bag!

It's going to take a lot of work to elect MJ this November, and we need everyone reading this to dig deep, if you can. **[Will you donate to help us build the campaign we need to WIN?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e92/7f51f7bc/40d3e96d/4ef79454/845649515/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.3nd__1842__&amount=10")**

\-- Team MJ

| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e92/7f51f7bc/40d3e96d/4ef79454/845649515/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200804.3nd__1842__&amount=10")

|

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e92/7f51f7bc/40d3e96d/4ef7944a/845649515/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

subject: UPDATE: We officially have a Republican opponent

body:
Together, we’re going to win this race in November -- and when I am your next U.S. Senator, I will work my heart out every day on behalf of your families, our state, and our Kansas values. |
---
| | Results just came in: we’re up against Roger Marshall, a doctor who is not following the science on COVID-19, opposes Medicaid expansion, and wants to overturn the Affordable Care Act in the middle of a global pandemic. **Mitch McConnell and corporate special interests will be lining up to send far-right candidate Roger Marshall to the Senate. They already spent millions to drag him through the primary.
